authors_text: Xiaoming Zhao,Yuan-Ting Hu,Zhongzheng Ren,Alexander G. Schwing
title: Occupancy Planes for Single-view RGB-D Human Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于单视图 RGB-D 人体重建的占用平面
abstract: Single-view RGB-D human reconstruction with implicit functions is often formulated as per-point classification. Specifically, a set of 3D locations within the view-frustum of the camera are first projected independently onto the image and a corresponding feature is subsequently extracted for each 3D location. The feature of each 3D location is then used to classify independently whether the corresponding 3D point is inside or outside the observed object. This procedure leads to sub-optimal results because correlations between predictions for neighboring locations are only taken into account implicitly via the extracted features. For more accurate results we propose the occupancy planes (OPlanes) representation, which enables to formulate single-view RGB-D human reconstruction as occupancy prediction on planes which slice through the camera's view frustum. Such a representation provides more flexibility than voxel grids and enables to better leverage correlations than per-point classification. On the challenging S3D data we observe a simple classifier based on the OPlanes representation to yield compelling results, especially in difficult situations with partial occlusions due to other objects and partial visibility, which haven't been addressed by prior work.
summary: Single-view RGB-D human reconstruction with implicit functions is often formulated as per-point classification. Specifically, a set of 3D locations within the view-frustum of the camera are first projected independently onto the image and a corresponding feature is subsequently extracted for each 3D location. The feature of each 3D location is then used to classify independently whether the corresponding 3D point is inside or outside the observed object. This procedure leads to sub-optimal results because correlations between predictions for neighboring locations are only taken into account implicitly via the extracted features. For more accurate results we propose the occupancy planes (OPlanes) representation, which enables to formulate single-view RGB-D human reconstruction as occupancy prediction on planes which slice through the camera's view frustum. Such a representation provides more flexibility than voxel grids and enables to better leverage correlations than per-point classification. On the challenging S3D data we observe a simple classifier based on the OPlanes representation to yield compelling results, especially in difficult situations with partial occlusions due to other objects and partial visibility, which haven't been addressed by prior work.
abstract_zh: 使用隐函数的单视图 RGB-D 人体重建通常被表述为每点分类。具体来说，首先将相机视锥体内的一组 3D 位置独立投影到图像上，然后为每个 3D 位置提取相应的特征。然后使用每个 3D 位置的特征来独立分类相应的 3D 点是在观察对象的内部还是外部。此过程会导致次优结果，因为仅通过提取的特征隐式地考虑相邻位置的预测之间的相关性。为了获得更准确的结果，我们提出了占用平面（OPlanes）表示，它能够将单视图 RGB-D 人体重建制定为穿过相机视锥体的平面上的占用预测。这种表示比体素网格提供了更大的灵活性，并且能够比每点分类更好地利用相关性。在具有挑战性的 S3D 数据上，我们观察到基于 OPlanes 表示的简单分类器可以产生令人信服的结果，特别是在由于其他对象和部分可见性而导致部分遮挡的困难情况下，而先前的工作尚未解决这些问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于occupancy planes（OPlanes）的单视角RGB-D人体重建方法，通过平面占用预测提升重建精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于隐式函数的单视角RGB-D重建方法采用逐点分类，难以有效利用相邻点的相关性，导致在遮挡等复杂场景下效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出OPlanes表示，将重建问题转化为对切割相机视锥体的平面进行占用预测，相比体素网格更灵活，且能更好捕捉空间相关性。
AI.result: 在S3D数据集上，基于OPlanes的简单分类器在部分遮挡等挑战性场景下取得优于现有方法的结果。
AI.conclusion: OPlanes方法通过平面表示有效提升了单视角人体重建的鲁棒性，尤其适用于复杂遮挡场景。

Specifically, a set of 3D locations within the view-frustum of the camera are first projected independently onto the image and a corresponding feature is subsequently extracted for each 3D location. The feature of each 3D location is then used to classify independently whether the corresponding 3D point is inside or outside the observed object. This procedure leads to sub-optimal results because correlations between predictions for neighboring locations are only taken into account implicitly via the extracted features. authors_text: Bolin Ni,Houwen Peng,Minghao Chen,Songyang Zhang,Gaofeng Meng,Jianlong Fu,Shiming Xiang,Haibin Ling
title: Expanding Language-Image Pretrained Models for General Video Recognition
title_zh: 扩展用于通用视频识别的语言图像预训练模型
abstract: Contrastive language-image pretraining has shown great success in learning visual-textual joint representation from web-scale data, demonstrating remarkable "zero-shot" generalization ability for various image tasks. However, how to effectively expand such new language-image pretraining methods to video domains is still an open problem. In this work, we present a simple yet effective approach that adapts the pretrained language-image models to video recognition directly, instead of pretraining a new model from scratch. More concretely, to capture the long-range dependencies of frames along the temporal dimension, we propose a cross-frame attention mechanism that explicitly exchanges information across frames. Such module is lightweight and can be plugged into pretrained language-image models seamlessly. Moreover, we propose a video-specific prompting scheme, which leverages video content information for generating discriminative textual prompts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach is effective and can be generalized to different video recognition scenarios. In particular, under fully-supervised settings, our approach achieves a top-1 accuracy of 87.1% on Kinectics-400, while using 12 times fewer FLOPs compared with Swin-L and ViViT-H. In zero-shot experiments, our approach surpasses the current state-of-the-art methods by +7.6% and +14.9% in terms of top-1 accuracy under two popular protocols. In few-shot scenarios, our approach outperforms previous best methods by +32.1% and +23.1% when the labeled data is extremely limited. Code and models are available at https://aka.ms/X-CLIP
summary: Contrastive language-image pretraining has shown great success in learning visual-textual joint representation from web-scale data, demonstrating remarkable "zero-shot" generalization ability for various image tasks. However, how to effectively expand such new language-image pretraining methods to video domains is still an open problem. In this work, we present a simple yet effective approach that adapts the pretrained language-image models to video recognition directly, instead of pretraining a new model from scratch. More concretely, to capture the long-range dependencies of frames along the temporal dimension, we propose a cross-frame attention mechanism that explicitly exchanges information across frames. Such module is lightweight and can be plugged into pretrained language-image models seamlessly. Moreover, we propose a video-specific prompting scheme, which leverages video content information for generating discriminative textual prompts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach is effective and can be generalized to different video recognition scenarios. In particular, under fully-supervised settings, our approach achieves a top-1 accuracy of 87.1% on Kinectics-400, while using 12 times fewer FLOPs compared with Swin-L and ViViT-H. In zero-shot experiments, our approach surpasses the current state-of-the-art methods by +7.6% and +14.9% in terms of top-1 accuracy under two popular protocols. In few-shot scenarios, our approach outperforms previous best methods by +32.1% and +23.1% when the labeled data is extremely limited. Code and models are available at https://aka.ms/X-CLIP
abstract_zh: 对比语言-图像预训练在从网络规模数据中学习视觉-文本联合表示方面取得了巨大成功，展示了针对各种图像任务的卓越的“零样本”泛化能力。然而，如何有效地将这种新的语言图像预训练方法扩展到视频领域仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，将预训练的语言图像模型直接应用于视频识别，而不是从头开始预训练新模型。更具体地说，为了捕获帧在时间维度上的远程依赖性，我们提出了一种跨帧注意机制，可以显式地跨帧交换信息。这样的模块是轻量级的，可以无缝插入到预训练的语言图像模型中。此外，我们提出了一种特定于视频的提示方案，该方案利用视频内容信息来生成有区别的文本提示。大量的实验证明我们的方法是有效的，并且可以推广到不同的视频识别场景。特别是，在完全监督的设置下，我们的方法在 Kinectics-400 上实现了 87.1% 的 top-1 准确率，同时与 Swin-L 和 ViViT-H 相比，使用的 FLOP 减少了 12 倍。在零样本实验中，我们的方法在两种流行协议下的 top-1 准确率方面超过了当前最先进的方法 +7.6% 和 +14.9%。在少样本场景中，当标记数据极其有限时，我们的方法比以前的最佳方法分别提高了 32.1% 和 23.1%。代码和模型可在 https://aka.ms/X-CLIP 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出将语言-图像预训练模型扩展至视频领域的方法，以提升视频识别任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管对比语言-图像预训练在图像任务中表现优异，但如何将其有效扩展到视频领域仍是未解难题。
AI.method: 设计轻量级跨帧注意力机制捕捉时序依赖，并引入视频特定的提示生成方案，直接适配预训练模型而无需从头训练。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400数据集上达到87.1%的Top-1准确率（计算量仅为Swin-L和ViViT-H的1/12），零样本场景下超越现有方法7.6%-14.9%，少样本场景下提升32.1%-23.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模块化设计实现了高效视频识别，验证了语言-图像预训练模型在视频领域的有效性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Anastasios N. Angelopoulos,Stephen Bates,Adam Fisch,Lihua Lei,Tal Schuster
title: Conformal Risk Control
title_zh: 保形风险控制
abstract: We extend conformal prediction to control the expected value of any monotone loss function. The algorithm generalizes split conformal prediction together with its coverage guarantee. Like conformal prediction, the conformal risk control procedure is tight up to an $\mathcal{O}(1/n)$ factor. We also introduce extensions of the idea to distribution shift, quantile risk control, multiple and adversarial risk control, and expectations of U-statistics. Worked examples from computer vision and natural language processing demonstrate the usage of our algorithm to bound the false negative rate, graph distance, and token-level F1-score.
summary: We extend conformal prediction to control the expected value of any monotone loss function. The algorithm generalizes split conformal prediction together with its coverage guarantee. Like conformal prediction, the conformal risk control procedure is tight up to an $\mathcal{O}(1/n)$ factor. We also introduce extensions of the idea to distribution shift, quantile risk control, multiple and adversarial risk control, and expectations of U-statistics. Worked examples from computer vision and natural language processing demonstrate the usage of our algorithm to bound the false negative rate, graph distance, and token-level F1-score.
abstract_zh: 我们扩展共形预测来控制任何单调损失函数的期望值。该算法概括了分割共形预测及其覆盖范围保证。与保形预测一样，保形风险控制程序严格遵守 $\mathcal{O}(1/n)$ 因子。我们还将这一思想扩展到分布转移、分位数风险控制、多重风险控制和对抗性风险控制以及 U 统计期望。计算机视觉和自然语言处理的工作示例展示了我们的算法如何限制假阴性率、图距离和标记级 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了符合预测方法以控制任意单调损失函数的期望值，并推广至分布偏移、分位数风险控制等场景。
AI.motivation: 传统符合预测仅能控制覆盖概率，无法处理更通用的风险度量，需扩展方法以适应分布偏移和对抗环境下的风险控制需求。
AI.method: 提出符合风险控制算法，结合分割符合预测框架，适用于单调损失函数，并扩展至分布偏移、分位数控制、多重风险及U统计量期望场景。
AI.result: 在计算机视觉与自然语言处理任务中验证了算法有效性，成功控制假阴性率、图距离及标记级F1分数等指标。

search_text: Conformal Risk Control 保形风险控制 We extend conformal prediction to control the expected value of any monotone loss function. The algorithm generalizes split conformal prediction together with its coverage guarantee. Like conformal prediction, the conformal risk control procedure is tight up to an $\mathcal{O}(1/n)$ factor. We also introduce extensions of the idea to distribution shift, quantile risk control, multiple and adversarial risk control, and expectations of U-statistics. Worked examples from computer vision and natural language processing demonstrate the usage of our algorithm to bound the false negative rate, graph distance, and token-level F1-score. 我们扩展共形预测来控制任何单调损失函数的期望值。该算法概括了分割共形预测及其覆盖范围保证。与保形预测一样，保形风险控制程序严格遵守 $\mathcal{O}(1/n)$ 因子。我们还将这一思想扩展到分布转移、分位数风险控制、多重风险控制和对抗性风险控制以及 U 统计期望。计算机视觉和自然语言处理的工作示例展示了我们的算法如何限制假阴性率、图距离和标记级 F1 分数。 本文扩展了符合预测方法以控制任意单调损失函数的期望值，并推广至分布偏移、分位数风险控制等场景。 Anastasios N. Angelopoulos,Stephen Bates,Adam Fisch,Lihua Lei,Tal Schuster stat.ME,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.ST,stat.ML

authors_text: Zixiang Chen,Yihe Deng,Yue Wu,Quanquan Gu,Yuanzhi Li
title: Towards Understanding Mixture of Experts in Deep Learning
title_zh: 理解深度学习专家的混合体
abstract: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layer, a sparsely-activated model controlled by a router, has achieved great success in deep learning. However, the understanding of such architecture remains elusive. In this paper, we formally study how the MoE layer improves the performance of neural network learning and why the mixture model will not collapse into a single model. Our empirical results suggest that the cluster structure of the underlying problem and the non-linearity of the expert are pivotal to the success of MoE. To further understand this, we consider a challenging classification problem with intrinsic cluster structures, which is hard to learn using a single expert. Yet with the MoE layer, by choosing the experts as two-layer nonlinear convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we show that the problem can be learned successfully. Furthermore, our theory shows that the router can learn the cluster-center features, which helps divide the input complex problem into simpler linear classification sub-problems that individual experts can conquer. To our knowledge, this is the first result towards formally understanding the mechanism of the MoE layer for deep learning.
summary: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layer, a sparsely-activated model controlled by a router, has achieved great success in deep learning. However, the understanding of such architecture remains elusive. In this paper, we formally study how the MoE layer improves the performance of neural network learning and why the mixture model will not collapse into a single model. Our empirical results suggest that the cluster structure of the underlying problem and the non-linearity of the expert are pivotal to the success of MoE. To further understand this, we consider a challenging classification problem with intrinsic cluster structures, which is hard to learn using a single expert. Yet with the MoE layer, by choosing the experts as two-layer nonlinear convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we show that the problem can be learned successfully. Furthermore, our theory shows that the router can learn the cluster-center features, which helps divide the input complex problem into simpler linear classification sub-problems that individual experts can conquer. To our knowledge, this is the first result towards formally understanding the mechanism of the MoE layer for deep learning.
abstract_zh: 专家混合（MoE）层是一种由路由器控制的稀疏激活模型，在深度学习中取得了巨大成功。然而，对这种架构的理解仍然难以捉摸。在本文中，我们正式研究了 MoE 层如何提高神经网络学习的性能以及为什么混合模型不会崩溃为单个模型。我们的实证结果表明，根本问题的聚类结构和专家的非线性对于 MoE 的成功至关重要。为了进一步理解这一点，我们考虑具有内在集群结构的具有挑战性的分类问题，这很难使用单个专家来学习。然而，在 MoE 层中，通过选择专家作为两层非线性卷积神经网络（CNN），我们表明可以成功地学习该问题。此外，我们的理论表明，路由器可以学习聚类中心特征，这有助于将输入的复杂问题划分为单个专家可以克服的更简单的线性分类子问题。据我们所知，这是正式理解 MoE 层深度学习机制的第一个结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）架构在深度学习中的性能提升机制，并解释为何该结构不会退化为单一模型。
AI.motivation: 尽管MoE层在深度学习中表现出色，但其成功背后的理论机制尚不明确，尤其缺乏对其抗退化能力的解释。
AI.method: 通过设计具有内在聚类结构的分类任务，结合非线性卷积神经网络（CNN）专家模型，进行实证分析；同时从理论上证明路由器能学习聚类中心特征，将复杂问题分解为子问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，MoE通过非线性专家与聚类结构的协同作用可成功解决单专家难以处理的问题，理论分析验证了路由器对聚类特征的学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次从理论上阐明了MoE机制，证明聚类结构、非线性专家及路由器的协同作用是其成功的关键，为后续研究提供了理论基础。

However, the understanding of such architecture remains elusive. In this paper, we formally study how the MoE layer improves the performance of neural network learning and why the mixture model will not collapse into a single model. Our empirical results suggest that the cluster structure of the underlying problem and the non-linearity of the expert are pivotal to the success of MoE. To further understand this, we consider a challenging classification problem with intrinsic cluster structures, which is hard to learn using a single expert. Yet with the MoE layer, by choosing the experts as two-layer nonlinear convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we show that the problem can be learned successfully. authors_text: Ziyi Wang,Xumin Yu,Yongming Rao,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: P2P: Tuning Pre-trained Image Models for Point Cloud Analysis with Point-to-Pixel Prompting
title_zh: P2P：通过点到像素提示调整用于点云分析的预训练图像模型
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022, project page: https://p2p.ivg-research.xyz
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022, project page: https://p2p.ivg-research.xyz
abstract: Nowadays, pre-training big models on large-scale datasets has become a crucial topic in deep learning. The pre-trained models with high representation ability and transferability achieve a great success and dominate many downstream tasks in natural language processing and 2D vision. However, it is non-trivial to promote such a pretraining-tuning paradigm to the 3D vision, given the limited training data that are relatively inconvenient to collect. In this paper, we provide a new perspective of leveraging pre-trained 2D knowledge in 3D domain to tackle this problem, tuning pre-trained image models with the novel Point-to-Pixel prompting for point cloud analysis at a minor parameter cost. Following the principle of prompting engineering, we transform point clouds into colorful images with geometry-preserved projection and geometry-aware coloring to adapt to pre-trained image models, whose weights are kept frozen during the end-to-end optimization of point cloud analysis tasks. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that cooperating with our proposed Point-to-Pixel Prompting, better pre-trained image model will lead to consistently better performance in 3D vision. Enjoying prosperous development from image pre-training field, our method attains 89.3% accuracy on the hardest setting of ScanObjectNN, surpassing conventional point cloud models with much fewer trainable parameters. Our framework also exhibits very competitive performance on ModelNet classification and ShapeNet Part Segmentation. Code is available at https://github.com/wangzy22/P2P.
summary: Nowadays, pre-training big models on large-scale datasets has become a crucial topic in deep learning. The pre-trained models with high representation ability and transferability achieve a great success and dominate many downstream tasks in natural language processing and 2D vision. However, it is non-trivial to promote such a pretraining-tuning paradigm to the 3D vision, given the limited training data that are relatively inconvenient to collect. In this paper, we provide a new perspective of leveraging pre-trained 2D knowledge in 3D domain to tackle this problem, tuning pre-trained image models with the novel Point-to-Pixel prompting for point cloud analysis at a minor parameter cost. Following the principle of prompting engineering, we transform point clouds into colorful images with geometry-preserved projection and geometry-aware coloring to adapt to pre-trained image models, whose weights are kept frozen during the end-to-end optimization of point cloud analysis tasks. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that cooperating with our proposed Point-to-Pixel Prompting, better pre-trained image model will lead to consistently better performance in 3D vision. Enjoying prosperous development from image pre-training field, our method attains 89.3% accuracy on the hardest setting of ScanObjectNN, surpassing conventional point cloud models with much fewer trainable parameters. Our framework also exhibits very competitive performance on ModelNet classification and ShapeNet Part Segmentation. Code is available at https://github.com/wangzy22/P2P.
abstract_zh: 如今，在大规模数据集上预训练大模型已成为深度学习的一个重要课题。具有高表示能力和可迁移性的预训练模型取得了巨大成功，并主导了自然语言处理和2D视觉中的许多下游任务。然而，考虑到训练数据有限且收集起来相对不方便，将这种预训练调整范式推广到 3D 视觉并非易事。在本文中，我们提供了利用 3D 领域中预训练的 2D 知识来解决此问题的新视角，通过新颖的点到像素提示以较小的参数成本调整预训练的图像模型，以进行点云分析。遵循促进工程的原则，我们将点云转换为具有几何保留投影和几何感知着色的彩色图像，以适应预先训练的图像模型，其权重在点云分析任务的端到端优化过程中保持冻结。我们进行了大量的实验来证明，与我们提出的点到像素提示配合，更好的预训练图像模型将带来持续更好的 3D 视觉性能。受益于图像预训练领域的蓬勃发展，我们的方法在 ScanObjectNN 最难的设置上达到了 89.3% 的准确率，以更少的可训练参数超越了传统的点云模型。我们的框架在 ModelNet 分类和 ShapeNet 零件分割方面也表现出非常有竞争力的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/wangzy22/P2P 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过点到像素的提示方法，以低成本参数调整预训练图像模型用于点云分析，解决3D视觉任务中数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 预训练模型在2D领域表现优异，但3D点云数据因采集困难难以直接应用同类方法，需探索跨领域知识迁移方案。
AI.method: 将点云投影为保留几何结构的彩色图像，结合预训练图像模型进行冻结权重的端到端优化，通过提示工程实现2D模型到3D任务的适配。
AI.result: 在ScanObjectNN数据集上达到89.3%准确率，超越传统点云模型且参数量更少，在ModelNet和ShapeNet任务中亦表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效验证了2D预训练模型向3D领域迁移的可行性，为资源受限的3D视觉任务提供了高效解决方案。

method: 将点云投影为保留几何结构的彩色图像，结合预训练图像模型进行冻结权重的端到端优化，通过提示工程实现2D模型到3D任务的适配。
result: 在ScanObjectNN数据集上达到89.3%准确率，超越传统点云模型且参数量更少，在ModelNet和ShapeNet任务中亦表现优异。
conclusion: 该方法有效验证了2D预训练模型向3D领域迁移的可行性，为资源受限的3D视觉任务提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: P2P: Tuning Pre-trained Image Models for Point Cloud Analysis with Point-to-Pixel Prompting P2P：通过点到像素提示调整用于点云分析的预训练图像模型 Nowadays, pre-training big models on large-scale datasets has become a crucial topic in deep learning. The pre-trained models with high representation ability and transferability achieve a great success and dominate many downstream tasks in natural language processing and 2D vision. However, it is non-trivial to promote such a pretraining-tuning paradigm to the 3D vision, given the limited training data that are relatively inconvenient to collect. In this paper, we provide a new perspective of leveraging pre-trained 2D knowledge in 3D domain to tackle this problem, tuning pre-trained image models with the novel Point-to-Pixel prompting for point cloud analysis at a minor parameter cost. Following the principle of prompting engineering, we transform point clouds into colorful images with geometry-preserved projection and geometry-aware coloring to adapt to pre-trained image models, whose weights are kept frozen during the end-to-end optimization of point cloud analysis tasks. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that cooperating with our proposed Point-to-Pixel Prompting, better pre-trained image model will lead to consistently better performance in 3D vision. Enjoying prosperous development from image pre-training field, our method attains 89.3% accuracy on the hardest setting of ScanObjectNN, surpassing conventional point cloud models with much fewer trainable parameters. Our framework also exhibits very competitive performance on ModelNet classification and ShapeNet Part Segmentation. Code is available at https://github.com/wangzy22/P2P. 如今，在大规模数据集上预训练大模型已成为深度学习的一个重要课题。具有高表示能力和可迁移性的预训练模型取得了巨大成功，并主导了自然语言处理和2D视觉中的许多下游任务。然而，考虑到训练数据有限且收集起来相对不方便，将这种预训练调整范式推广到 3D 视觉并非易事。在本文中，我们提供了利用 3D 领域中预训练的 2D 知识来解决此问题的新视角，通过新颖的点到像素提示以较小的参数成本调整预训练的图像模型，以进行点云分析。遵循促进工程的原则，我们将点云转换为具有几何保留投影和几何感知着色的彩色图像，以适应预先训练的图像模型，其权重在点云分析任务的端到端优化过程中保持冻结。我们进行了大量的实验来证明，与我们提出的点到像素提示配合，更好的预训练图像模型将带来持续更好的 3D 视觉性能。受益于图像预训练领域的蓬勃发展，我们的方法在 ScanObjectNN 最难的设置上达到了 89.3% 的准确率，以更少的可训练参数超越了传统的点云模型。我们的框架在 ModelNet 分类和 ShapeNet 零件分割方面也表现出非常有竞争力的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/wangzy22/P2P 获取。 本文提出通过点到像素的提示方法，以低成本参数调整预训练图像模型用于点云分析，解决3D视觉任务中数据不足的问题。 Ziyi Wang,Xumin Yu,Yongming Rao,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Aymeric Blot,Justyna Petke
title: MAGPIE: Machine Automated General Performance Improvement via Evolution of Software
title_zh: MAGPIE：通过软件发展实现机器自动化总体性能改进
abstract: Performance is one of the most important qualities of software. Several techniques have thus been proposed to improve it, such as program transformations, optimisation of software parameters, or compiler flags. Many automated software improvement approaches use similar search strategies to explore the space of possible improvements, yet available tooling only focuses on one approach at a time. This makes comparisons and exploration of interactions of the various types of improvement impractical. We propose MAGPIE, a unified software improvement framework. It provides a common edit sequence based representation that isolates the search process from the specific improvement technique, enabling a much simplified synergistic workflow. We provide a case study using a basic local search to compare compiler optimisation, algorithm configuration, and genetic improvement. We chose running time as our efficiency measure and evaluated our approach on four real-world software, written in C, C++, and Java. Our results show that, used independently, all techniques find significant running time improvements: up to 25% for compiler optimisation, 97% for algorithm configuration, and 61% for evolving source code using genetic improvement. We also show that up to 10% further increase in performance can be obtained with partial combinations of the variants found by the different techniques. Furthermore, the common representation also enables simultaneous exploration of all techniques, providing a competitive alternative to using each technique individually.
summary: Performance is one of the most important qualities of software. Several techniques have thus been proposed to improve it, such as program transformations, optimisation of software parameters, or compiler flags. Many automated software improvement approaches use similar search strategies to explore the space of possible improvements, yet available tooling only focuses on one approach at a time. This makes comparisons and exploration of interactions of the various types of improvement impractical. We propose MAGPIE, a unified software improvement framework. It provides a common edit sequence based representation that isolates the search process from the specific improvement technique, enabling a much simplified synergistic workflow. We provide a case study using a basic local search to compare compiler optimisation, algorithm configuration, and genetic improvement. We chose running time as our efficiency measure and evaluated our approach on four real-world software, written in C, C++, and Java. Our results show that, used independently, all techniques find significant running time improvements: up to 25% for compiler optimisation, 97% for algorithm configuration, and 61% for evolving source code using genetic improvement. We also show that up to 10% further increase in performance can be obtained with partial combinations of the variants found by the different techniques. Furthermore, the common representation also enables simultaneous exploration of all techniques, providing a competitive alternative to using each technique individually.
abstract_zh: 性能是软件最重要的品质之一。因此，人们提出了几种技术来改进它，例如程序转换、软件参数优化或编译器标志。许多自动化软件改进方法使用类似的搜索策略来探索可能的改进空间，但可用的工具一次只关注一种方法。这使得对各种改进类型的相互作用进行比较和探索变得不切实际。我们提出 MAGPIE，一个统一的软件改进框架。它提供了一种基于通用编辑序列的表示，将搜索过程与特定的改进技术隔离开来，从而实现了大大简化的协同工作流程。我们提供了一个使用基本本地搜索来比较编译器优化、算法配置和遗传改进的案例研究。我们选择运行时间作为效率衡量标准，并在四个用 C、C++ 和 Java 编写的实际软件上评估了我们的方法。我们的结果表明，独立使用时，所有技术都可以显着提高运行时间：编译器优化高达 25%，算法配置高达 97%，使用遗传改进改进源代码则高达 61%。我们还表明，通过不同技术发现的变体的部分组合，可以获得高达 10% 的性能进一步提升。此外，通用表示还可以同时探索所有技术，为单独使用每种技术提供有竞争力的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAGPIE框架，通过统一表示和协同探索多种软件优化技术，提升程序性能。
AI.motivation: 现有软件优化工具仅支持单一优化方法，难以比较不同技术或组合使用，限制了性能提升潜力。
AI.method: 设计通用编辑序列表示，解耦搜索过程与具体优化技术，通过局部搜索比较编译器优化、算法配置和遗传改进，并探索技术组合效果。
AI.result: 独立使用时，编译器优化最高提升25%，算法配置达97%，遗传改进61%；技术组合可额外提升10%性能。
AI.conclusion: MAGPIE的统一表示支持多技术协同优化，相比单独使用各技术能更高效挖掘性能提升空间。

authors_text: Jonata Tyska Carvalho,Stefano Nolfi
title: The Role of Morphological Variation in Evolutionary Robotics: Maximizing Performance and Robustness
title_zh: 形态变异在进化机器人中的作用：最大化性能和鲁棒性
comment: submitted to MIT Evolutionary Computation Journal
comments: submitted to MIT Evolutionary Computation Journal
abstract: Exposing an Evolutionary Algorithm that is used to evolve robot controllers to variable conditions is necessary to obtain solutions which are robust and can cross the reality gap. However, we do not yet have methods for analyzing and understanding the impact of the varying morphological conditions which impact the evolutionary process, and therefore for choosing suitable variation ranges. By morphological conditions, we refer to the starting state of the robot, and to variations in its sensor readings during operation due to noise. In this article, we introduce a method that permits us to measure the impact of these morphological variations and we analyze the relation between the amplitude of variations, the modality with which they are introduced, and the performance and robustness of evolving agents. Our results demonstrate that (i) the evolutionary algorithm can tolerate morphological variations which have a very high impact, (ii) variations affecting the actions of the agent are tolerated much better than variations affecting the initial state of the agent or of the environment, and (iii) improving the accuracy of the fitness measure through multiple evaluations is not always useful. Moreover, our results show that morphological variations permit generating solutions which perform better both in varying and non-varying conditions.
summary: Exposing an Evolutionary Algorithm that is used to evolve robot controllers to variable conditions is necessary to obtain solutions which are robust and can cross the reality gap. However, we do not yet have methods for analyzing and understanding the impact of the varying morphological conditions which impact the evolutionary process, and therefore for choosing suitable variation ranges. By morphological conditions, we refer to the starting state of the robot, and to variations in its sensor readings during operation due to noise. In this article, we introduce a method that permits us to measure the impact of these morphological variations and we analyze the relation between the amplitude of variations, the modality with which they are introduced, and the performance and robustness of evolving agents. Our results demonstrate that (i) the evolutionary algorithm can tolerate morphological variations which have a very high impact, (ii) variations affecting the actions of the agent are tolerated much better than variations affecting the initial state of the agent or of the environment, and (iii) improving the accuracy of the fitness measure through multiple evaluations is not always useful. Moreover, our results show that morphological variations permit generating solutions which perform better both in varying and non-varying conditions.
abstract_zh: 为了获得稳健且能够跨越现实差距的解决方案，有必要公开一种用于使机器人控制器进化到可变条件的进化算法。然而，我们还没有方法来分析和理解影响进化过程的不同形态条件的影响，从而选择合适的变异范围。通过形态条件，我们指的是机器人的启动状态，以及操作期间由于噪声而导致的传感器读数的变化。在本文中，我们介绍了一种方法，可以测量这些形态变化的影响，并分析变化幅度、引入变化的方式以及进化代理的性能和鲁棒性之间的关系。我们的结果表明，（i）进化算法可以容忍具有非常高影响的形态变化，（ii）影响智能体行为的变化比影响智能体或环境初始状态的变化更容易被容忍，（iii）通过多次评估提高适应度测量的准确性并不总是有用的。此外，我们的结果表明，形态变化允许生成在变化和不变条件下表现更好的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究形态变异在进化机器人中的作用，提出测量形态变异对进化代理性能和鲁棒性影响的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏对形态变异如何影响进化过程的分析，导致难以选择合适的变异范围，需解决这一理论空白。
AI.method: 引入量化形态变异影响的测量方法，分析变异幅度、引入方式与代理性能/鲁棒性的关系，通过实验验证不同变异条件下的演化结果。
AI.result: 演化算法可容忍高幅度形态变异；动作相关变异比初始状态或环境变异更易被容忍；多次评估未必提升适应度准确性；形态变异能生成在稳定与变化环境下均表现优异的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 形态变异是提升进化机器人性能与鲁棒性的关键因素，需在算法设计中系统考虑其影响机制。

In this article, we introduce a method that permits us to measure the impact of these morphological variations and we analyze the relation between the amplitude of variations, the modality with which they are introduced, and the performance and robustness of evolving agents. Our results demonstrate that (i) the evolutionary algorithm can tolerate morphological variations which have a very high impact, (ii) variations affecting the actions of the agent are tolerated much better than variations affecting the initial state of the agent or of the environment, and (iii) improving the accuracy of the fitness measure through multiple evaluations is not always useful. Moreover, our results show that morphological variations permit generating solutions which perform better both in varying and non-varying conditions. 为了获得稳健且能够跨越现实差距的解决方案，有必要公开一种用于使机器人控制器进化到可变条件的进化算法。然而，我们还没有方法来分析和理解影响进化过程的不同形态条件的影响，从而选择合适的变异范围。通过形态条件，我们指的是机器人的启动状态，以及操作期间由于噪声而导致的传感器读数的变化。在本文中，我们介绍了一种方法，可以测量这些形态变化的影响，并分析变化幅度、引入变化的方式以及进化代理的性能和鲁棒性之间的关系。我们的结果表明，（i）进化算法可以容忍具有非常高影响的形态变化，（ii）影响智能体行为的变化比影响智能体或环境初始状态的变化更容易被容忍，（iii）通过多次评估提高适应度测量的准确性并不总是有用的。此外，我们的结果表明，形态变化允许生成在变化和不变条件下表现更好的解决方案。 本文研究形态变异在进化机器人中的作用，提出测量形态变异对进化代理性能和鲁棒性影响的方法。 Jonata Tyska Carvalho,Stefano Nolfi cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Humberto Carvalho,Pavel Zaykov,Asim Ukaye
title: Leveraging the HW/SW Optimizations and Ecosystems that Drive the AI Revolution
title_zh: 利用硬件/软件优化和生态系统推动人工智能革命
abstract: This paper presents a state-of-the-art overview on how to architect, design, and optimize Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) such that performance is improved and accuracy is preserved. The paper covers a set of optimizations that span the entire Machine Learning processing pipeline. We introduce two types of optimizations. The first alters the DNN model and requires NN re-training, while the second does not. We focus on GPU optimizations, but we believe the presented techniques can be used with other AI inference platforms. To demonstrate the DNN model optimizations, we improve one of the most advanced deep network architectures for optical flow, RAFT arXiv:2003.12039, on a popular edge AI inference platform (Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier).
summary: This paper presents a state-of-the-art overview on how to architect, design, and optimize Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) such that performance is improved and accuracy is preserved. The paper covers a set of optimizations that span the entire Machine Learning processing pipeline. We introduce two types of optimizations. The first alters the DNN model and requires NN re-training, while the second does not. We focus on GPU optimizations, but we believe the presented techniques can be used with other AI inference platforms. To demonstrate the DNN model optimizations, we improve one of the most advanced deep network architectures for optical flow, RAFT arXiv:2003.12039, on a popular edge AI inference platform (Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier).
abstract_zh: 本文概述了如何构建、设计和优化深度神经网络 (DNN)，从而提高性能并保持准确性。该论文涵盖了涵盖整个机器学习处理流程的一组优化。我们引入两种类型的优化。第一个改变了 DNN 模型并需要重新训练神经网络，而第二个则不需要。我们专注于 GPU 优化，但我们相信所提出的技术可以与其他人工智能推理平台一起使用。为了演示 DNN 模型优化，我们在流行的边缘 AI 推理平台（Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier）上改进了最先进的光流深度网络架构之一 RAFT arXiv:2003.12039。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了如何通过硬件/软件优化和生态系统提升深度神经网络的性能与准确性，重点介绍两种优化方法并在边缘AI平台验证。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在性能与准确性之间存在权衡，需更高效的优化方法以适应边缘计算场景。
AI.method: 提出两种DNN优化方法：需重训练的模型级优化与无需重训练的推理级优化，重点基于GPU实现并验证于Nvidia Jetson平台。
AI.result: 在Nvidia Jetson AGX Xavier上成功优化先进光流网络RAFT，实现性能提升且保持精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提优化方法有效，可扩展至其他AI推理平台，推动边缘设备AI应用发展。

authors_text: Tarun Kalluri,Manmohan Chandraker
title: Cluster-to-adapt: Few Shot Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation across Disjoint Labels
title_zh: 集群适应：跨不相交标签的语义分割的少量镜头域适应
comment: Accepted to L3D workshop at CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to L3D workshop at CVPR 2022
abstract: Domain adaptation for semantic segmentation across datasets consisting of the same categories has seen several recent successes. However, a more general scenario is when the source and target datasets correspond to non-overlapping label spaces. For example, categories in segmentation datasets change vastly depending on the type of environment or application, yet share many valuable semantic relations. Existing approaches based on feature alignment or discrepancy minimization do not take such category shift into account. In this work, we present Cluster-to-Adapt (C2A), a computationally efficient clustering-based approach for domain adaptation across segmentation datasets with completely different, but possibly related categories. We show that such a clustering objective enforced in a transformed feature space serves to automatically select categories across source and target domains that can be aligned for improving the target performance, while preventing negative transfer for unrelated categories. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through experiments on the challenging problem of outdoor to indoor adaptation for semantic segmentation in few-shot as well as zero-shot settings, with consistent improvements in performance over existing approaches and baselines in all cases.
summary: Domain adaptation for semantic segmentation across datasets consisting of the same categories has seen several recent successes. However, a more general scenario is when the source and target datasets correspond to non-overlapping label spaces. For example, categories in segmentation datasets change vastly depending on the type of environment or application, yet share many valuable semantic relations. Existing approaches based on feature alignment or discrepancy minimization do not take such category shift into account. In this work, we present Cluster-to-Adapt (C2A), a computationally efficient clustering-based approach for domain adaptation across segmentation datasets with completely different, but possibly related categories. We show that such a clustering objective enforced in a transformed feature space serves to automatically select categories across source and target domains that can be aligned for improving the target performance, while preventing negative transfer for unrelated categories. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through experiments on the challenging problem of outdoor to indoor adaptation for semantic segmentation in few-shot as well as zero-shot settings, with consistent improvements in performance over existing approaches and baselines in all cases.
abstract_zh: 跨由相同类别组成的数据集进行语义分割的领域适应最近取得了一些成功。然而，更一般的情况是源数据集和目标数据集对应于不重叠的标签空间。例如，分割数据集中的类别根据环境或应用程序的类型而发生巨大变化，但共享许多有价值的语义关系。基于特征对齐或差异最小化的现有方法没有考虑这种类别转变。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Cluster-to-Adapt (C2A)，这是一种计算高效的基于聚类的方法，用于跨具有完全不同但可能相关类别的分割数据集进行域适应。我们表明，在转换后的特征空间中实施的这种聚类目标可以自动选择跨源域和目标域的类别，这些类别可以对齐以提高目标性能，同时防止不相关类别的负迁移。我们通过对少样本和零样本设置中语义分割的室外到室内适应这一具有挑战性的问题进行实验，证明了我们的方法的有效性，在所有情况下，与现有方法和基线相比，性能得到了一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Cluster-to-Adapt（C2A）的聚类方法，用于解决语义分割中源域和目标域标签不重叠情况下的领域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应方法在处理标签空间不重叠但存在语义关联的场景时效果不佳，无法有效对齐相关类别并防止无关类别的负迁移。
AI.method: 通过在转换后的特征空间中执行聚类目标，自动选择源域和目标域中可对齐的类别，同时避免无关类别的干扰。
AI.result: 在户外到室内的语义分割适应任务中，C2A在少样本和零样本设置下均优于现有方法和基线模型。
AI.conclusion: C2A通过聚类策略有效解决了跨不相交标签领域的语义分割适应问题，提供了计算高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Liliane Momeni,Hannah Bull,K R Prajwal,Samuel Albanie,Gül Varol,Andrew Zisserman
title: Automatic dense annotation of large-vocabulary sign language videos
title_zh: 大词汇量手语视频自动密集标注
abstract: Recently, sign language researchers have turned to sign language interpreted TV broadcasts, comprising (i) a video of continuous signing and (ii) subtitles corresponding to the audio content, as a readily available and large-scale source of training data. One key challenge in the usability of such data is the lack of sign annotations. Previous work exploiting such weakly-aligned data only found sparse correspondences between keywords in the subtitle and individual signs. In this work, we propose a simple, scalable framework to vastly increase the density of automatic annotations. Our contributions are the following: (1) we significantly improve previous annotation methods by making use of synonyms and subtitle-signing alignment; (2) we show the value of pseudo-labelling from a sign recognition model as a way of sign spotting; (3) we propose a novel approach for increasing our annotations of known and unknown classes based on in-domain exemplars; (4) on the BOBSL BSL sign language corpus, we increase the number of confident automatic annotations from 670K to 5M. We make these annotations publicly available to support the sign language research community.
summary: Recently, sign language researchers have turned to sign language interpreted TV broadcasts, comprising (i) a video of continuous signing and (ii) subtitles corresponding to the audio content, as a readily available and large-scale source of training data. One key challenge in the usability of such data is the lack of sign annotations. Previous work exploiting such weakly-aligned data only found sparse correspondences between keywords in the subtitle and individual signs. In this work, we propose a simple, scalable framework to vastly increase the density of automatic annotations. Our contributions are the following: (1) we significantly improve previous annotation methods by making use of synonyms and subtitle-signing alignment; (2) we show the value of pseudo-labelling from a sign recognition model as a way of sign spotting; (3) we propose a novel approach for increasing our annotations of known and unknown classes based on in-domain exemplars; (4) on the BOBSL BSL sign language corpus, we increase the number of confident automatic annotations from 670K to 5M. We make these annotations publicly available to support the sign language research community.
abstract_zh: 最近，手语研究人员转向手语翻译电视广播，包括（i）连续手语的视频和（ii）与音频内容相对应的字幕，作为易于获得的大规模训练数据源。此类数据可用性的一个关键挑战是缺乏符号注释。之前利用这种弱对齐数据的工作仅发现字幕中的关键字与单个符号之间的稀疏对应关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单的、可扩展的框架来大大增加自动注释的密度。我们的贡献如下：（1）我们通过使用同义词和字幕签名对齐显着改进了以前的注释方法； (2) 我们展示了符号识别模型中的伪标签作为一种符号识别方式的价值； （3）我们提出了一种新的方法来增加基于域内示例的已知和未知类的注释； (4)在BOBSL BSL手语语料库上，我们将置信度自动标注的数量从670K增加到5M。我们公开这些注释以支持手语研究社区。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动密集注释大词汇量手语视频的框架，通过利用字幕与手语视频的对齐关系及同义词信息，显著提升注释密度。
AI.motivation: 现有手语研究数据缺乏细粒度注释，仅能通过字幕与手语视频的弱对齐获取稀疏关键词对应关系，限制了模型训练效果。
AI.method: 融合同义词扩展、字幕-手语对齐、伪标签生成及领域内实例迁移四类技术，构建可扩展的自动注释框架。
AI.result: 在BOBSL语料库上将可信自动注释量从67万提升至500万，并公开注释数据支持研究社区。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升手语视频注释密度，为大规模手语识别模型训练提供高质量数据支持。

search_text: Automatic dense annotation of large-vocabulary sign language videos 大词汇量手语视频自动密集标注 Recently, sign language researchers have turned to sign language interpreted TV broadcasts, comprising (i) a video of continuous signing and (ii) subtitles corresponding to the audio content, as a readily available and large-scale source of training data. One key challenge in the usability of such data is the lack of sign annotations. Previous work exploiting such weakly-aligned data only found sparse correspondences between keywords in the subtitle and individual signs. In this work, we propose a simple, scalable framework to vastly increase the density of automatic annotations. Our contributions are the following: (1) we significantly improve previous annotation methods by making use of synonyms and subtitle-signing alignment; (2) we show the value of pseudo-labelling from a sign recognition model as a way of sign spotting; (3) we propose a novel approach for increasing our annotations of known and unknown classes based on in-domain exemplars; (4) on the BOBSL BSL sign language corpus, we increase the number of confident automatic annotations from 670K to 5M. We make these annotations publicly available to support the sign language research community. 最近，手语研究人员转向手语翻译电视广播，包括（i）连续手语的视频和（ii）与音频内容相对应的字幕，作为易于获得的大规模训练数据源。此类数据可用性的一个关键挑战是缺乏符号注释。之前利用这种弱对齐数据的工作仅发现字幕中的关键字与单个符号之间的稀疏对应关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单的、可扩展的框架来大大增加自动注释的密度。我们的贡献如下：（1）我们通过使用同义词和字幕签名对齐显着改进了以前的注释方法； (2) 我们展示了符号识别模型中的伪标签作为一种符号识别方式的价值； （3）我们提出了一种新的方法来增加基于域内示例的已知和未知类的注释； (4)在BOBSL BSL手语语料库上，我们将置信度自动标注的数量从670K增加到5M。我们公开这些注释以支持手语研究社区。 本文提出一种自动密集注释大词汇量手语视频的框架，通过利用字幕与手语视频的对齐关系及同义词信息，显著提升注释密度。 Liliane Momeni,Hannah Bull,K R Prajwal,Samuel Albanie,Gül Varol,Andrew Zisserman cs.CV

authors_text: Yinbo Chen,Xiaolong Wang
title: Transformers as Meta-Learners for Implicit Neural Representations
title_zh: Transformers 作为隐式神经表示的元学习器
comment: ECCV 2022. Project page with code: https://yinboc.github.io/trans-inr/
comments: ECCV 2022. Project page with code: https://yinboc.github.io/trans-inr/
abstract: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have emerged and shown their benefits over discrete representations in recent years. However, fitting an INR to the given observations usually requires optimization with gradient descent from scratch, which is inefficient and does not generalize well with sparse observations. To address this problem, most of the prior works train a hypernetwork that generates a single vector to modulate the INR weights, where the single vector becomes an information bottleneck that limits the reconstruction precision of the output INR. Recent work shows that the whole set of weights in INR can be precisely inferred without the single-vector bottleneck by gradient-based meta-learning. Motivated by a generalized formulation of gradient-based meta-learning, we propose a formulation that uses Transformers as hypernetworks for INRs, where it can directly build the whole set of INR weights with Transformers specialized as set-to-set mapping. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for building INRs in different tasks and domains, including 2D image regression and view synthesis for 3D objects. Our work draws connections between the Transformer hypernetworks and gradient-based meta-learning algorithms and we provide further analysis for understanding the generated INRs.
summary: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have emerged and shown their benefits over discrete representations in recent years. However, fitting an INR to the given observations usually requires optimization with gradient descent from scratch, which is inefficient and does not generalize well with sparse observations. To address this problem, most of the prior works train a hypernetwork that generates a single vector to modulate the INR weights, where the single vector becomes an information bottleneck that limits the reconstruction precision of the output INR. Recent work shows that the whole set of weights in INR can be precisely inferred without the single-vector bottleneck by gradient-based meta-learning. Motivated by a generalized formulation of gradient-based meta-learning, we propose a formulation that uses Transformers as hypernetworks for INRs, where it can directly build the whole set of INR weights with Transformers specialized as set-to-set mapping. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for building INRs in different tasks and domains, including 2D image regression and view synthesis for 3D objects. Our work draws connections between the Transformer hypernetworks and gradient-based meta-learning algorithms and we provide further analysis for understanding the generated INRs.
abstract_zh: 近年来，隐式神经表示（INR）已经出现，并显示出其相对于离散表示的优势。然而，将 INR 拟合到给定的观测值通常需要从头开始使用梯度下降进行优化，这是低效的，并且不能很好地推广稀疏观测值。为了解决这个问题，大多数现有工作训练一个超网络，生成单个向量来调制INR权重，其中单个向量成为限制输出INR重建精度的信息瓶颈。最近的研究表明，通过基于梯度的元学习，可以精确推断 INR 中的整个权重集，而无需考虑单向量瓶颈。受基于梯度的元学习的广义公式的启发，我们提出了一种使用 Transformer 作为 INR 超网络的公式，它可以使用专门作为集合到集合映射的 Transformer 直接构建整套 INR 权重。我们展示了我们的方法在不同任务和领域中构建 INR 的有效性，包括 2D 图像回归和 3D 对象的视图合成。我们的工作在 Transformer 超网络和基于梯度的元学习算法之间建立了联系，并提供了进一步的分析来理解生成的 INR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Transformer作为超网络用于隐式神经表示（INR），以提升其重建精度和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统INR训练依赖从头开始的梯度下降优化，效率低下且在稀疏观测下泛化能力差；现有超网络方法因单向量瓶颈限制了重建精度。
AI.method: 基于梯度元学习框架，设计Transformer作为超网络直接生成完整INR权重，实现集合到集合的映射。
AI.result: 在2D图像回归和3D物体视图合成任务中验证了方法有效性，展示了比单向量瓶颈方法更优的重建性能。
AI.conclusion: 建立了Transformer超网络与梯度元学习的联系，为理解生成INR的机制提供了新分析视角。

authors_text: Yuexin Ma,Tai Wang,Xuyang Bai,Huitong Yang,Yuenan Hou,Yaming Wang,Yu Qiao,Ruigang Yang,Dinesh Manocha,Xinge Zhu
title: Vision-Centric BEV Perception: A Survey
title_zh: 以视觉为中心的纯电动汽车认知：一项调查
abstract: In recent years, vision-centric Bird's Eye View (BEV) perception has garnered significant interest from both industry and academia due to its inherent advantages, such as providing an intuitive representation of the world and being conducive to data fusion. The rapid advancements in deep learning have led to the proposal of numerous methods for addressing vision-centric BEV perception challenges. However, there has been no recent survey encompassing this novel and burgeoning research field. To catalyze future research, this paper presents a comprehensive survey of the latest developments in vision-centric BEV perception and its extensions. It compiles and organizes up-to-date knowledge, offering a systematic review and summary of prevalent algorithms. Additionally, the paper provides in-depth analyses and comparative results on various BEV perception tasks, facilitating the evaluation of future works and sparking new research directions. Furthermore, the paper discusses and shares valuable empirical implementation details to aid in the advancement of related algorithms.
summary: In recent years, vision-centric Bird's Eye View (BEV) perception has garnered significant interest from both industry and academia due to its inherent advantages, such as providing an intuitive representation of the world and being conducive to data fusion. The rapid advancements in deep learning have led to the proposal of numerous methods for addressing vision-centric BEV perception challenges. However, there has been no recent survey encompassing this novel and burgeoning research field. To catalyze future research, this paper presents a comprehensive survey of the latest developments in vision-centric BEV perception and its extensions. It compiles and organizes up-to-date knowledge, offering a systematic review and summary of prevalent algorithms. Additionally, the paper provides in-depth analyses and comparative results on various BEV perception tasks, facilitating the evaluation of future works and sparking new research directions. Furthermore, the paper discusses and shares valuable empirical implementation details to aid in the advancement of related algorithms.
abstract_zh: 近年来，以视觉为中心的鸟瞰（BEV）感知因其固有的优势（例如提供对世界的直观表示和有利于数据融合）而引起了工业界和学术界的极大兴趣。深度学习的快速进步催生了多种方法来解决以视觉为中心的纯电动汽车感知挑战。然而，最近还没有针对这一新颖且新兴的研究领域的调查。为了促进未来的研究，本文对以视觉为中心的纯电动汽车感知及其扩展的最新发展进行了全面调查。它编译和整理了最新知识，对流行算法进行了系统回顾和总结。此外，本文还对各种 BEV 感知任务进行了深入的分析和比较结果，有助于评估未来的工作并激发新的研究方向。此外，本文讨论并分享了有价值的经验实现细节，以帮助相关算法的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于视觉的鸟瞰图（BEV）感知技术进行了全面综述，总结了最新方法并分析了其应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于视觉的BEV感知在学术界和工业界受到广泛关注，但尚缺乏对该新兴领域的系统性综述，亟需梳理现有方法以推动未来研究。
AI.method: 通过收集和整理最新研究成果，系统性地分类与总结主流算法，并对不同BEV感知任务进行深入分析与对比实验。
AI.result: 提供了BEV感知任务的算法分类、性能对比及实施细节，明确了当前研究的优势与不足，并提出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为BEV感知领域提供了系统性参考，有助于评估后续工作并激发新研究方向，同时分享了有价值的工程实践经验。

authors_text: Dora Zhao,Mikako Inaba,Andrés Monroy-Hernández
title: Understanding Teenage Perceptions and Configurations of Privacy on Instagram
title_zh: 了解青少年对 Instagram 隐私的看法和配置
abstract: As teenage use of social media platform continues to proliferate, so do concerns about teenage privacy and safety online. Prior work has established that privacy on networked publics, such as social media, is complex, requiring users to navigate not only the technical affordances on the platform but also interpersonal relationships and social norms. We investigate how teenagers think about privacy on the popular image-sharing platform, Instagram. We draw on an online survey (N=144) and semi-structured interviews (N=21) with teenagers, ages 13-19, to gain a better understanding how teenagers configure privacy on the popular image-sharing platform Instagram and why they make these privacy decisions. Finally, based on our findings, we provide design recommendations towards the design of better privacy controls for promoting teenage safety online.
summary: As teenage use of social media platform continues to proliferate, so do concerns about teenage privacy and safety online. Prior work has established that privacy on networked publics, such as social media, is complex, requiring users to navigate not only the technical affordances on the platform but also interpersonal relationships and social norms. We investigate how teenagers think about privacy on the popular image-sharing platform, Instagram. We draw on an online survey (N=144) and semi-structured interviews (N=21) with teenagers, ages 13-19, to gain a better understanding how teenagers configure privacy on the popular image-sharing platform Instagram and why they make these privacy decisions. Finally, based on our findings, we provide design recommendations towards the design of better privacy controls for promoting teenage safety online.
abstract_zh: 随着青少年使用社交媒体平台的不断增多，对青少年在线隐私和安全的担忧也在增加。先前的研究表明，社交媒体等网络公众的隐私非常复杂，要求用户不仅要了解平台上的技术可供性，还要了解人际关系和社会规范。我们调查了青少年如何看待流行的图像共享平台 Instagram 上的隐私。我们利用对 13-19 岁青少年的在线调查 (N=144) 和半结构化访谈 (N=21) 来更好地了解青少年如何在流行的图像共享平台 Instagram 上配置隐私以及他们为何做出这些隐私决定。最后，根据我们的发现，我们提供了设计建议，旨在设计更好的隐私控制，以促进青少年的在线安全。

AI.tldr: 研究青少年在Instagram上的隐私观念及配置方式，分析其隐私决策原因，并提出设计建议。
AI.motivation: 随着青少年社交媒体使用增加，隐私安全问题凸显，需深入理解其隐私配置行为及影响因素，以改进平台隐私设计。
AI.method: 通过在线调查（144名青少年）和半结构化访谈（21名青少年）收集数据，分析其隐私配置行为和决策原因。
AI.result: 发现青少年在Instagram上隐私配置的多样性，其决策受技术功能、社交关系及社会规范等多重因素影响。
AI.conclusion: 建议优化隐私控制设计，平衡技术功能与社交需求，提升青少年在线隐私保护效果。

authors_text: Hanlin Chen,Brian Liu,Xumiao Zhang,Feng Qian,Z. Morley Mao,Yiheng Feng
title: A Cooperative Perception Environment for Traffic Operations and Control
title_zh: 交通运营与控制的协作感知环境
abstract: Existing data collection methods for traffic operations and control usually rely on infrastructure-based loop detectors or probe vehicle trajectories. Connected and automated vehicles (CAVs) not only can report data about themselves but also can provide the status of all detected surrounding vehicles. Integration of perception data from multiple CAVs as well as infrastructure sensors (e.g., LiDAR) can provide richer information even under a very low penetration rate. This paper aims to develop a cooperative data collection system, which integrates Lidar point cloud data from both infrastructure and CAVs to create a cooperative perception environment for various transportation applications. The state-of-the-art 3D detection models are applied to detect vehicles in the merged point cloud. We test the proposed cooperative perception environment with the max pressure adaptive signal control model in a co-simulation platform with CARLA and SUMO. Results show that very low penetration rates of CAV plus an infrastructure sensor are sufficient to achieve comparable performance with 30% or higher penetration rates of connected vehicles (CV). We also show the equivalent CV penetration rate (E-CVPR) under different CAV penetration rates to demonstrate the data collection efficiency of the cooperative perception environment.
summary: Existing data collection methods for traffic operations and control usually rely on infrastructure-based loop detectors or probe vehicle trajectories. Connected and automated vehicles (CAVs) not only can report data about themselves but also can provide the status of all detected surrounding vehicles. Integration of perception data from multiple CAVs as well as infrastructure sensors (e.g., LiDAR) can provide richer information even under a very low penetration rate. This paper aims to develop a cooperative data collection system, which integrates Lidar point cloud data from both infrastructure and CAVs to create a cooperative perception environment for various transportation applications. The state-of-the-art 3D detection models are applied to detect vehicles in the merged point cloud. We test the proposed cooperative perception environment with the max pressure adaptive signal control model in a co-simulation platform with CARLA and SUMO. Results show that very low penetration rates of CAV plus an infrastructure sensor are sufficient to achieve comparable performance with 30% or higher penetration rates of connected vehicles (CV). We also show the equivalent CV penetration rate (E-CVPR) under different CAV penetration rates to demonstrate the data collection efficiency of the cooperative perception environment.
abstract_zh: 现有的交通运营和控制数据收集方法通常依赖于基于基础设施的环路检测器或探测车辆轨迹。联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 不仅可以报告自身数据，还可以提供所有检测到的周围车辆的状态。即使在渗透率非常低的情况下，集成来自多个 CAV 和基础设施传感器（例如 LiDAR）的感知数据也可以提供更丰富的信息。本文旨在开发一种协作数据收集系统，集成来自基础设施和 CAV 的激光雷达点云数据，为各种交通应用创建协作感知环境。最先进的 3D 检测模型用于检测合并点云中的车辆。我们在 CARLA 和 SUMO 联合仿真平台上使用最大压力自适应信号控制模型测试了所提出的协作感知环境。结果表明，非常低的 CAV 渗透率加上基础设施传感器足以实现与 30% 或更高渗透率的联网车辆 (CV) 相当的性能。我们还展示了不同 CAV 渗透率下的等效 CV 渗透率（E-CVPR），以证明协作感知环境的数据收集效率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种融合基础设施和自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）激光雷达数据的协同感知环境，以提升交通运行与控制的数据采集效率。
AI.motivation: 传统交通数据采集依赖固定检测器或探针车辆，存在覆盖不足的问题。CAVs可提供周围车辆状态信息，结合基础设施传感器可提升低渗透率下的数据丰富性。
AI.method: 整合基础设施和CAVs的激光雷达点云数据，应用先进3D检测模型进行目标识别，并通过CARLA与SUMO协同仿真平台测试最大压力自适应信号控制模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，极低渗透率的CAVs结合基础设施传感器即可达到30%以上联网车辆（CV）渗透率的性能水平，并提出等效CV渗透率（E-CVPR）量化数据采集效率。
AI.conclusion: 协同感知环境可在低CAVs渗透率下实现高效交通管理，为未来智能交通系统提供低成本数据支撑方案。

authors_text: Khabat Soltanian,Ali Ebnenasir,Mohsen Afsharchi
title: Modular Grammatical Evolution for the Generation of Artificial Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于生成人工神经网络的模块化语法演化
abstract: This paper presents a novel method, called Modular Grammatical Evolution (MGE), towards validating the hypothesis that restricting the solution space of NeuroEvolution to modular and simple neural networks enables the efficient generation of smaller and more structured neural networks while providing acceptable (and in some cases superior) accuracy on large data sets. MGE also enhances the state-of-the-art Grammatical Evolution (GE) methods in two directions. First, MGE's representation is modular in that each individual has a set of genes, and each gene is mapped to a neuron by grammatical rules. Second, the proposed representation mitigates two important drawbacks of GE, namely the low scalability and weak locality of representation, towards generating modular and multi-layer networks with a high number of neurons. We define and evaluate five different forms of structures with and without modularity using MGE and find single-layer modules with no coupling more productive. Our experiments demonstrate that modularity helps in finding better neural networks faster. We have validated the proposed method using ten well-known classification benchmarks with different sizes, feature counts, and output class count. Our experimental results indicate that MGE provides superior accuracy with respect to existing NeuroEvolution methods and returns classifiers that are significantly simpler than other machine learning generated classifiers. Finally, we empirically demonstrate that MGE outperforms other GE methods in terms of locality and scalability properties.
summary: This paper presents a novel method, called Modular Grammatical Evolution (MGE), towards validating the hypothesis that restricting the solution space of NeuroEvolution to modular and simple neural networks enables the efficient generation of smaller and more structured neural networks while providing acceptable (and in some cases superior) accuracy on large data sets. MGE also enhances the state-of-the-art Grammatical Evolution (GE) methods in two directions. First, MGE's representation is modular in that each individual has a set of genes, and each gene is mapped to a neuron by grammatical rules. Second, the proposed representation mitigates two important drawbacks of GE, namely the low scalability and weak locality of representation, towards generating modular and multi-layer networks with a high number of neurons. We define and evaluate five different forms of structures with and without modularity using MGE and find single-layer modules with no coupling more productive. Our experiments demonstrate that modularity helps in finding better neural networks faster. We have validated the proposed method using ten well-known classification benchmarks with different sizes, feature counts, and output class count. Our experimental results indicate that MGE provides superior accuracy with respect to existing NeuroEvolution methods and returns classifiers that are significantly simpler than other machine learning generated classifiers. Finally, we empirically demonstrate that MGE outperforms other GE methods in terms of locality and scalability properties.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种称为模块化语法进化（MGE）的新方法，旨在验证以下假设：将 NeuroEvolution 的解决方案空间限制为模块化和简单的神经网络，能够有效生成更小、更结构化的神经网络，同时在大数据集上提供可接受的（在某些情况下更高）的准确性。 MGE 还在两个方向上增强了最先进的语法进化（GE）方法。首先，MGE 的表示是模块化的，因为每个个体都有一组基因，每个基因通过语法规则映射到一个神经元。其次，所提出的表示缓解了 GE 的两个重要缺点，即表示的低可扩展性和弱局部性，以生成具有大量神经元的模块化和多层网络。我们使用 MGE 定义和评估五种不同形式的具有和不具有模块化的结构，并发现没有耦合的单层模块更加高效。我们的实验表明，模块化有助于更快地找到更好的神经网络。我们使用十个具有不同大小、特征计数和输出类计数的著名分类基准验证了所提出的方法。我们的实验结果表明，MGE 相对于现有的 NeuroEvolution 方法提供了更高的准确性，并且返回的分类器比其他机器学习生成的分类器要简单得多。最后，我们凭经验证明 MGE 在局部性和可扩展性方面优于其他 GE 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为模块化语法进化（MGE）的新方法，用于生成结构更简单且效率更高的神经网络。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在验证通过限制神经进化解空间为模块化和简单网络，可以生成更小、更结构化的神经网络，并在大型数据集上提供可接受的准确性。
AI.method: MGE通过模块化表示，每个基因映射到一个神经元，并通过语法规则生成网络，同时解决了语法进化（GE）中可扩展性和表示局部性差的问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，MGE在多个分类基准测试中表现出更高的准确性，并生成更简单的分类器，同时在局部性和可扩展性方面优于其他GE方法。
AI.conclusion: MGE方法在生成更高效、更简单的神经网络方面优于现有神经进化方法，且在多个基准测试中表现优异。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为模块化语法进化（MGE）的新方法，用于生成结构更简单且效率更高的神经网络。
ai_content.motivation: 本文旨在验证通过限制神经进化解空间为模块化和简单网络，可以生成更小、更结构化的神经网络，并在大型数据集上提供可接受的准确性。
ai_content.method: MGE通过模块化表示，每个基因映射到一个神经元，并通过语法规则生成网络，同时解决了语法进化（GE）中可扩展性和表示局部性差的问题。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，MGE在多个分类基准测试中表现出更高的准确性，并生成更简单的分类器，同时在局部性和可扩展性方面优于其他GE方法。
ai_content.conclusion: MGE方法在生成更高效、更简单的神经网络方面优于现有神经进化方法，且在多个基准测试中表现优异。

search_text: Modular Grammatical Evolution for the Generation of Artificial Neural Networks 用于生成人工神经网络的模块化语法演化 This paper presents a novel method, called Modular Grammatical Evolution (MGE), towards validating the hypothesis that restricting the solution space of NeuroEvolution to modular and simple neural networks enables the efficient generation of smaller and more structured neural networks while providing acceptable (and in some cases superior) accuracy on large data sets. MGE also enhances the state-of-the-art Grammatical Evolution (GE) methods in two directions. First, MGE's representation is modular in that each individual has a set of genes, and each gene is mapped to a neuron by grammatical rules. Second, the proposed representation mitigates two important drawbacks of GE, namely the low scalability and weak locality of representation, towards generating modular and multi-layer networks with a high number of neurons. We define and evaluate five different forms of structures with and without modularity using MGE and find single-layer modules with no coupling more productive. Our experiments demonstrate that modularity helps in finding better neural networks faster. We have validated the proposed method using ten well-known classification benchmarks with different sizes, feature counts, and output class count. Our experimental results indicate that MGE provides superior accuracy with respect to existing NeuroEvolution methods and returns classifiers that are significantly simpler than other machine learning generated classifiers. Finally, we empirically demonstrate that MGE outperforms other GE methods in terms of locality and scalability properties. 本文提出了一种称为模块化语法进化（MGE）的新方法，旨在验证以下假设：将 NeuroEvolution 的解决方案空间限制为模块化和简单的神经网络，能够有效生成更小、更结构化的神经网络，同时在大数据集上提供可接受的（在某些情况下更高）的准确性。 MGE 还在两个方向上增强了最先进的语法进化（GE）方法。首先，MGE 的表示是模块化的，因为每个个体都有一组基因，每个基因通过语法规则映射到一个神经元。其次，所提出的表示缓解了 GE 的两个重要缺点，即表示的低可扩展性和弱局部性，以生成具有大量神经元的模块化和多层网络。我们使用 MGE 定义和评估五种不同形式的具有和不具有模块化的结构，并发现没有耦合的单层模块更加高效。我们的实验表明，模块化有助于更快地找到更好的神经网络。我们使用十个具有不同大小、特征计数和输出类计数的著名分类基准验证了所提出的方法。我们的实验结果表明，MGE 相对于现有的 NeuroEvolution 方法提供了更高的准确性，并且返回的分类器比其他机器学习生成的分类器要简单得多。最后，我们凭经验证明 MGE 在局部性和可扩展性方面优于其他 GE 方法。 本文提出了一种称为模块化语法进化（MGE）的新方法，用于生成结构更简单且效率更高的神经网络。 Khabat Soltanian,Ali Ebnenasir,Mohsen Afsharchi cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Wei Xia,John H. L. Hansen
title: Attention and DCT based Global Context Modeling for Text-independent Speaker Recognition
title_zh: 基于注意力和 DCT 的全局上下文建模，用于文本无关的说话人识别
abstract: Learning an effective speaker representation is crucial for achieving reliable performance in speaker verification tasks. Speech signals are high-dimensional, long, and variable-length sequences containing diverse information at each time-frequency (TF) location. The standard convolutional layer that operates on neighboring local regions often fails to capture the complex TF global information. Our motivation is to alleviate these challenges by increasing the modeling capacity, emphasizing significant information, and suppressing possible redundancies. We aim to design a more robust and efficient speaker recognition system by incorporating the benefits of attention mechanisms and Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) based signal processing techniques, to effectively represent the global information in speech signals. To achieve this, we propose a general global time-frequency context modeling block for speaker modeling. First, an attention-based context model is introduced to capture the long-range and non-local relationship across different time-frequency locations. Second, a 2D-DCT based context model is proposed to improve model efficiency and examine the benefits of signal modeling. A multi-DCT attention mechanism is presented to improve modeling power with alternate DCT base forms. Finally, the global context information is used to recalibrate salient time-frequency locations by computing the similarity between the global context and local features. This effectively improves the speaker verification performance compared to the standard ResNet model and Squeeze & Excitation block by a large margin. Our experimental results show that the proposed global context modeling method can efficiently improve the learned speaker representations by achieving channel-wise and time-frequency feature recalibration.

Speech signals are high-dimensional, long, and variable-length sequences containing diverse information at each time-frequency (TF) location. The standard convolutional layer that operates on neighboring local regions often fails to capture the complex TF global information. Our motivation is to alleviate these challenges by increasing the modeling capacity, emphasizing significant information, and suppressing possible redundancies. We aim to design a more robust and efficient speaker recognition system by incorporating the benefits of attention mechanisms and Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) based signal processing techniques, to effectively represent the global information in speech signals. To achieve this, we propose a general global time-frequency context modeling block for speaker modeling. First, an attention-based context model is introduced to capture the long-range and non-local relationship across different time-frequency locations. Second, a 2D-DCT based context model is proposed to improve model efficiency and examine the benefits of signal modeling. A multi-DCT attention mechanism is presented to improve modeling power with alternate DCT base forms. Finally, the global context information is used to recalibrate salient time-frequency locations by computing the similarity between the global context and local features. This effectively improves the speaker verification performance compared to the standard ResNet model and Squeeze & Excitation block by a large margin. Our experimental results show that the proposed global context modeling method can efficiently improve the learned speaker representations by achieving channel-wise and time-frequency feature recalibration.
abstract_zh: 学习有效的说话人表示对于在说话人验证任务中实现可靠的性能至关重要。语音信号是高维、长且可变长度的序列，在每个时频 (TF) 位置包含不同的信息。对邻近局部区域进行操作的标准卷积层通常无法捕获复杂的 TF 全局信息。我们的动机是通过提高建模能力、强调重要信息和抑制可能的冗余来缓解这些挑战。我们的目标是通过结合注意力机制和基于离散余弦变换（DCT）的信号处理技术的优点，设计一个更强大、更高效的说话人识别系统，以有效地表示语音信号中的全局信息。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种用于说话人建模的通用全局时频上下文建模块。首先，引入基于注意力的上下文模型来捕获不同时频位置的远程和非局部关系。其次，提出了基于 2D-DCT 的上下文模型，以提高模型效率并检查信号建模的好处。提出了一种多 DCT 注意力机制，以通过替代 DCT 基本形式提高建模能力。最后，通过计算全局上下文和局部特征之间的相似度，使用全局上下文信息来重新校准显着的时频位置。与标准 ResNet 模型和 Squeeze & Exitation 模块相比，这有效地大幅提高了说话人验证性能。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的全局上下文建模方法可以通过实现通道和时频特征重新校准来有效地改进学习的说话人表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合注意力机制和离散余弦变换（DCT）的全局上下文建模方法，用于改进文本无关的说话人识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积层难以捕捉语音信号的复杂时频全局信息，导致说话人验证性能受限。本文旨在通过增强建模能力、突出关键信息并抑制冗余，设计更鲁棒的说话人识别系统。
AI.method: 提出全局时频上下文建模模块：1) 使用注意力机制捕捉长距离非局部关系；2) 引入2D-DCT提升效率并验证信号建模优势；3) 通过多DCT注意力机制交替使用不同基底形式；4) 利用全局上下文与局部特征相似性重新校准显著时频区域。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在通道级和时频特征校准方面显著优于标准ResNet模型及Squeeze & Excitation模块，有效提升说话人验证性能。
AI.conclusion: 全局上下文建模方法通过时频特征重新校准，显著增强了说话人表示学习能力，为文本无关说话人识别提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jiazhen Liu,Lifeng Zhou,Ragesh Ramachandran,Gaurav S. Sukhatme,Vijay Kumar
title: Decentralized Risk-Aware Tracking of Multiple Targets
title_zh: 多个目标的去中心化风险感知跟踪
abstract: We consider the setting where a team of robots is tasked with tracking multiple targets with the following property: approaching the targets enables more accurate target position estimation, but also increases the risk of sensor failures. Therefore, it is essential to address the trade-off between tracking quality maximization and risk minimization. In our previous work, a centralized controller is developed to plan motions for all the robots -- however, this is not a scalable approach. Here, we present a decentralized and risk-aware multi-target tracking framework, in which each robot plans its motion trading off tracking accuracy maximization and aversion to risk, while only relying on its own information and information exchanged with its neighbors. We use the control barrier function to guarantee network connectivity throughout the tracking process. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that our system can achieve similar tracking accuracy and risk-awareness to its centralized counterpart.
summary: We consider the setting where a team of robots is tasked with tracking multiple targets with the following property: approaching the targets enables more accurate target position estimation, but also increases the risk of sensor failures. Therefore, it is essential to address the trade-off between tracking quality maximization and risk minimization. In our previous work, a centralized controller is developed to plan motions for all the robots -- however, this is not a scalable approach. Here, we present a decentralized and risk-aware multi-target tracking framework, in which each robot plans its motion trading off tracking accuracy maximization and aversion to risk, while only relying on its own information and information exchanged with its neighbors. We use the control barrier function to guarantee network connectivity throughout the tracking process. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that our system can achieve similar tracking accuracy and risk-awareness to its centralized counterpart.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑这样的设置：一组机器人负责跟踪具有以下属性的多个目标：接近目标可以实现更准确的目标位置估计，但也会增加传感器故障的风险。因此，必须解决跟踪质量最大化和风险最小化之间的权衡。在我们之前的工作中，开发了一个集中控制器来规划所有机器人的运动——然而，这不是一种可扩展的方法。在这里，我们提出了一个分散的、具有风险意识的多目标跟踪框架，其中每个机器人都计划其运动，权衡跟踪精度最大化和规避风险，同时仅依赖于自己的信息以及与邻居交换的信息。我们使用控制屏障功能来保证整个跟踪过程中的网络连通性。大量的数值实验表明，我们的系统可以实现与集中式系统类似的跟踪精度和风险意识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种去中心化的多目标风险感知跟踪框架，使机器人团队在跟踪目标时平衡跟踪精度与风险规避。
AI.motivation: 集中式控制器虽能优化跟踪质量，但难以扩展；需解决跟踪精度提升与传感器故障风险增加的矛盾。
AI.method: 基于控制屏障函数确保网络连通性，各机器人仅依赖自身及邻居信息，自主规划运动以权衡跟踪精度与风险。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该系统在跟踪精度和风险意识方面表现与集中式方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的去中心化框架有效平衡了跟踪质量与风险，且具备可扩展性，性能接近集中式方案。

search_text: Decentralized Risk-Aware Tracking of Multiple Targets 多个目标的去中心化风险感知跟踪 We consider the setting where a team of robots is tasked with tracking multiple targets with the following property: approaching the targets enables more accurate target position estimation, but also increases the risk of sensor failures. Therefore, it is essential to address the trade-off between tracking quality maximization and risk minimization. In our previous work, a centralized controller is developed to plan motions for all the robots -- however, this is not a scalable approach. Here, we present a decentralized and risk-aware multi-target tracking framework, in which each robot plans its motion trading off tracking accuracy maximization and aversion to risk, while only relying on its own information and information exchanged with its neighbors. We use the control barrier function to guarantee network connectivity throughout the tracking process. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that our system can achieve similar tracking accuracy and risk-awareness to its centralized counterpart. 我们考虑这样的设置：一组机器人负责跟踪具有以下属性的多个目标：接近目标可以实现更准确的目标位置估计，但也会增加传感器故障的风险。因此，必须解决跟踪质量最大化和风险最小化之间的权衡。在我们之前的工作中，开发了一个集中控制器来规划所有机器人的运动——然而，这不是一种可扩展的方法。在这里，我们提出了一个分散的、具有风险意识的多目标跟踪框架，其中每个机器人都计划其运动，权衡跟踪精度最大化和规避风险，同时仅依赖于自己的信息以及与邻居交换的信息。我们使用控制屏障功能来保证整个跟踪过程中的网络连通性。大量的数值实验表明，我们的系统可以实现与集中式系统类似的跟踪精度和风险意识。 本文提出了一种去中心化的多目标风险感知跟踪框架，使机器人团队在跟踪目标时平衡跟踪精度与风险规避。 Jiazhen Liu,Lifeng Zhou,Ragesh Ramachandran,Gaurav S. Sukhatme,Vijay Kumar cs.RO

authors_text: Sushmita Gupta,Pallavi Jain,Sanjay Seetharaman
title: More Effort Towards Multiagent Knapsack
title_zh: 为多智能体背包付出更多努力
abstract: In this paper, we study some multiagent variants of the knapsack problem. Fluschnik et al. [AAAI 2019] considered the model in which every agent assigns some utility to every item. They studied three preference aggregation rules for finding a subset (knapsack) of items: individually best, diverse, and Nash-welfare-based. Informally, diversity is achieved by satisfying as many voters as possible. Motivated by the application of aggregation operators in multiwinner elections, we extend the study from diverse aggregation rule to Median and Best scoring functions. We study the computational and parameterized complexity of the problem with respect to some natural parameters, namely, the number of voters, the number of items, and the distance from an easy instance. We also study the complexity of the problem under domain restrictions. Furthermore, we present significantly faster parameterized algorithms with respect to the number of voters for the diverse aggregation rule.
summary: In this paper, we study some multiagent variants of the knapsack problem. Fluschnik et al. [AAAI 2019] considered the model in which every agent assigns some utility to every item. They studied three preference aggregation rules for finding a subset (knapsack) of items: individually best, diverse, and Nash-welfare-based. Informally, diversity is achieved by satisfying as many voters as possible. Motivated by the application of aggregation operators in multiwinner elections, we extend the study from diverse aggregation rule to Median and Best scoring functions. We study the computational and parameterized complexity of the problem with respect to some natural parameters, namely, the number of voters, the number of items, and the distance from an easy instance. We also study the complexity of the problem under domain restrictions. Furthermore, we present significantly faster parameterized algorithms with respect to the number of voters for the diverse aggregation rule.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了背包问题的一些多智能体变体。弗鲁施尼克等人。 [AAAI 2019] 考虑了每个代理为每个项目分配一些效用的模型。他们研究了三种用于查找项目子集（背包）的偏好聚合规则：个体最佳、多样化和基于纳什福利。非正式地说，多样性是通过满足尽可能多的选民来实现的。受聚合算子在多赢者选举中应用的推动，我们将研究从不同的聚合规则扩展到中值和最佳评分函数。我们研究问题相对于一些自然参数的计算和参数化复杂性，即选民数量、项目数量以及与简单实例的距离。我们还研究了领域限制下问题的复杂性。此外，我们针对不同聚合规则的投票者数量提出了明显更快的参数化算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多智能体背包问题的扩展，探讨基于中位数和最佳评分函数的偏好聚合规则的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 受多赢家选举中聚合算子应用的启发，扩展先前对多样化聚合规则的研究，探索更多聚合规则的可行性。
AI.method: 通过分析自然参数（如投票者数量、物品数量、与易解实例的距离）的计算复杂性，并研究领域限制下的问题复杂性，提出更高效的参数化算法。
AI.result: 确定了基于中位数和最佳评分函数的聚合规则在不同参数下的复杂性，并为多样化规则提供了显著更快的参数化算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展聚合规则并分析其复杂性，深化了对多智能体背包问题的理解，为实际应用提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Jingyi Wang,Shengchen Li
title: Keyword Spotting System and Evaluation of Pruning and Quantization Methods on Low-power Edge Microcontrollers
title_zh: 低功耗边缘微控制器的关键字识别系统以及修剪和量化方法的评估
comment: Submitted to DCASE2022 Workshop. Code available at: https://github.com/RoboBachelor/Keyword-Spotting-STM32
comments: Submitted to DCASE2022 Workshop. Code available at: https://github.com/RoboBachelor/Keyword-Spotting-STM32
abstract: Keyword spotting (KWS) is beneficial for voice-based user interactions with low-power devices at the edge. The edge devices are usually always-on, so edge computing brings bandwidth savings and privacy protection. The devices typically have limited memory spaces, computational performances, power and costs, for example, Cortex-M based microcontrollers. The challenge is to meet the high computation and low-latency requirements of deep learning on these devices. This paper firstly shows our small-footprint KWS system running on STM32F7 microcontroller with Cortex-M7 core @216MHz and 512KB static RAM. Our selected convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture has simplified number of operations for KWS to meet the constraint of edge devices. Our baseline system generates classification results for each 37ms including real-time audio feature extraction part. This paper further evaluates the actual performance for different pruning and quantization methods on microcontroller, including different granularity of sparsity, skipping zero weights, weight-prioritized loop order, and SIMD instruction. The result shows that for microcontrollers, there are considerable challenges for accelerate unstructured pruned models, and the structured pruning is more friendly than unstructured pruning. The result also verified that the performance improvement for quantization and SIMD instruction.
summary: Keyword spotting (KWS) is beneficial for voice-based user interactions with low-power devices at the edge. The edge devices are usually always-on, so edge computing brings bandwidth savings and privacy protection. The devices typically have limited memory spaces, computational performances, power and costs, for example, Cortex-M based microcontrollers. The challenge is to meet the high computation and low-latency requirements of deep learning on these devices. This paper firstly shows our small-footprint KWS system running on STM32F7 microcontroller with Cortex-M7 core @216MHz and 512KB static RAM. Our selected convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture has simplified number of operations for KWS to meet the constraint of edge devices. Our baseline system generates classification results for each 37ms including real-time audio feature extraction part. This paper further evaluates the actual performance for different pruning and quantization methods on microcontroller, including different granularity of sparsity, skipping zero weights, weight-prioritized loop order, and SIMD instruction. The result shows that for microcontrollers, there are considerable challenges for accelerate unstructured pruned models, and the structured pruning is more friendly than unstructured pruning. The result also verified that the performance improvement for quantization and SIMD instruction.
abstract_zh: 关键字识别 (KWS) 有利于基于语音的用户与边缘低功耗设备的交互。边缘设备通常始终在线，因此边缘计算带来带宽节省和隐私保护。这些设备通常具有有限的存储空间、计算性能、功耗和成本，例如基于 Cortex-M 的微控制器。面临的挑战是满足这些设备上深度学习的高计算和低延迟要求。本文首先展示了我们在 STM32F7 微控制器上运行的小型 KWS 系统，该微控制器具有 Cortex-M7 内核 @216MHz 和 512KB 静态 RAM。我们选择的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构简化了 KWS 的操作数量，以满足边缘设备的限制。我们的基线系统每 37 毫秒生成一次分类结果，包括实时音频特征提取部分。本文进一步评估了微控制器上不同剪枝和量化方法的实际性能，包括不同的稀疏粒度、跳过零权重、权重优先循环顺序和 SIMD 指令。结果表明，对于微控制器来说，加速非结构化剪枝模型存在相当大的挑战，并且结构化剪枝比非结构化剪枝更加友好。结果还验证了量化和SIMD指令的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级关键词识别系统，并评估了在低功耗边缘微控制器上进行剪枝和量化方法的实际性能。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备资源受限，需在低功耗下实现深度学习模型的高效运行，尤其是语音交互中的关键词识别任务。
AI.method: 基于STM32F7微控制器实现简化卷积神经网络（CNN），并通过不同粒度稀疏性、零权重跳过、权重优先循环顺序及SIMD指令等方法评估剪枝与量化效果。
AI.result: 结构化剪枝优于非结构化剪枝，量化与SIMD指令显著提升性能，但非结构化剪枝模型加速面临较大挑战。
AI.conclusion: 结构化剪枝和量化是微控制器优化的有效手段，而SIMD指令进一步提升效率，非结构化剪枝需更多优化策略。
