The result also verified that the performance improvement for quantization and SIMD instruction. 关键字识别 (KWS) 有利于基于语音的用户与边缘低功耗设备的交互。边缘设备通常始终在线，因此边缘计算带来带宽节省和隐私保护。这些设备通常具有有限的存储空间、计算性能、功耗和成本，例如基于 Cortex-M 的微控制器。面临的挑战是满足这些设备上深度学习的高计算和低延迟要求。本文首先展示了我们在 STM32F7 微控制器上运行的小型 KWS 系统，该微控制器具有 Cortex-M7 内核 @216MHz 和 512KB 静态 RAM。我们选择的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构简化了 KWS 的操作数量，以满足边缘设备的限制。我们的基线系统每 37 毫秒生成一次分类结果，包括实时音频特征提取部分。本文进一步评估了微控制器上不同剪枝和量化方法的实际性能，包括不同的稀疏粒度、跳过零权重、权重优先循环顺序和 SIMD 指令。结果表明，对于微控制器来说，加速非结构化剪枝模型存在相当大的挑战，并且结构化剪枝比非结构化剪枝更加友好。结果还验证了量化和SIMD指令的性能改进。 本文提出了一种轻量级关键词识别系统，并评估了在低功耗边缘微控制器上进行剪枝和量化方法的实际性能。 Jingyi Wang,Shengchen Li cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.AR,eess.AS

authors_text: Yiyou Sun,Yixuan Li
title: OpenCon: Open-world Contrastive Learning
title_zh: OpenCon：开放世界对比学习
abstract: Machine learning models deployed in the wild naturally encounter unlabeled samples from both known and novel classes. Challenges arise in learning from both the labeled and unlabeled data, in an open-world semi-supervised manner. In this paper, we introduce a new learning framework, open-world contrastive learning (OpenCon). OpenCon tackles the challenges of learning compact representations for both known and novel classes and facilitates novelty discovery along the way. We demonstrate the effectiveness of OpenCon on challenging benchmark datasets and establish competitive performance. On the ImageNet dataset, OpenCon significantly outperforms the current best method by 11.9% and 7.4% on novel and overall classification accuracy, respectively. Theoretically, OpenCon can be rigorously interpreted from an EM algorithm perspective--minimizing our contrastive loss partially maximizes the likelihood by clustering similar samples in the embedding space. The code is available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/opencon.
summary: Machine learning models deployed in the wild naturally encounter unlabeled samples from both known and novel classes. Challenges arise in learning from both the labeled and unlabeled data, in an open-world semi-supervised manner. In this paper, we introduce a new learning framework, open-world contrastive learning (OpenCon). OpenCon tackles the challenges of learning compact representations for both known and novel classes and facilitates novelty discovery along the way. We demonstrate the effectiveness of OpenCon on challenging benchmark datasets and establish competitive performance. On the ImageNet dataset, OpenCon significantly outperforms the current best method by 11.9% and 7.4% on novel and overall classification accuracy, respectively. Theoretically, OpenCon can be rigorously interpreted from an EM algorithm perspective--minimizing our contrastive loss partially maximizes the likelihood by clustering similar samples in the embedding space. The code is available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/opencon.
abstract_zh: 在野外部署的机器学习模型自然会遇到来自已知类别和新类别的未标记样本。以开放世界的半监督方式从标记和未标记数据中学习会出现挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的学习框架，开放世界对比学习（OpenCon）。 OpenCon 解决了学习已知类和新类的紧凑表示的挑战，并在此过程中促进新颖性的发现。我们展示了 OpenCon 在具有挑战性的基准数据集上的有效性并建立了具有竞争力的性能。在 ImageNet 数据集上，OpenCon 在新颖性和整体分类准确率方面分别显着优于当前最佳方法 11.9% 和 7.4%。理论上，OpenCon 可以从 EM 算法的角度进行严格解释——通过在嵌入空间中聚类相似样本，最小化我们的对比损失，从而部分最大化可能性。该代码可在 https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/opencon 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OpenCon的开放世界对比学习框架，旨在解决半监督学习中已知和新颖类别样本的表示学习与新颖性发现问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中的机器学习模型会遇到来自已知和新颖类别的未标记样本，现有方法难以有效处理开放世界中的半监督学习挑战。
AI.method: OpenCon通过对比学习框架联合利用标记和未标记数据，通过在嵌入空间中聚类相似样本实现紧凑表示学习，并从EM算法角度理论解释其有效性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，OpenCon在新颖类和总体分类准确率上分别超越当前最佳方法11.9%和7.4%，并在其他基准数据集上表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: OpenCon为开放世界半监督学习提供了有效解决方案，兼具理论严谨性与实际性能优势，代码已开源。

authors_text: Pedro C. Neto,Fadi Boutros,Joao Ribeiro Pinto,Naser Damer,Ana F. Sequeira,Jaime S. Cardoso,Messaoud Bengherabi,Abderaouf Bousnat,Sana Boucheta,Nesrine Hebbadj,Mustafa Ekrem Erakın,Uğur Demir,Hazım Kemal Ekenel,Pedro Beber de Queiroz Vidal,David Menotti
title: OCFR 2022: Competition on Occluded Face Recognition From Synthetically Generated Structure-Aware Occlusions
title_zh: OCFR 2022：基于合成生成的结构感知遮挡的遮挡人脸识别竞赛
comment: Accepted at International Joint Conference on Biometrics 2022
comments: Accepted at International Joint Conference on Biometrics 2022
abstract: This work summarizes the IJCB Occluded Face Recognition Competition 2022 (IJCB-OCFR-2022) embraced by the 2022 International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB 2022). OCFR-2022 attracted a total of 3 participating teams, from academia. Eventually, six valid submissions were submitted and then evaluated by the organizers. The competition was held to address the challenge of face recognition in the presence of severe face occlusions. The participants were free to use any training data and the testing data was built by the organisers by synthetically occluding parts of the face images using a well-known dataset. The submitted solutions presented innovations and performed very competitively with the considered baseline. A major output of this competition is a challenging, realistic, and diverse, and publicly available occluded face recognition benchmark with well defined evaluation protocols.
summary: This work summarizes the IJCB Occluded Face Recognition Competition 2022 (IJCB-OCFR-2022) embraced by the 2022 International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB 2022). OCFR-2022 attracted a total of 3 participating teams, from academia. Eventually, six valid submissions were submitted and then evaluated by the organizers. The competition was held to address the challenge of face recognition in the presence of severe face occlusions. The participants were free to use any training data and the testing data was built by the organisers by synthetically occluding parts of the face images using a well-known dataset. The submitted solutions presented innovations and performed very competitively with the considered baseline. A major output of this competition is a challenging, realistic, and diverse, and publicly available occluded face recognition benchmark with well defined evaluation protocols.
abstract_zh: 这项工作总结了 2022 年国际生物识别联合会议 (IJCB 2022) 所举办的 2022 年 IJCB 遮挡人脸识别竞赛 (IJCB-OCFR-2022)。 OCFR-2022总共吸引了来自学术界的3个参赛团队。最终，提交了六份有效的提交材料，然后由组织者进行评估。此次比赛的目的是解决人脸严重遮挡情况下的人脸识别挑战。参与者可以自由使用任何训练数据，测试数据由组织者通过使用众所周知的数据集综合遮挡部分面部图像来构建。提交的解决方案具有创新性，并且与所考虑的基线相比表现非常有竞争力。本次竞赛的主要成果是一个具有挑战性的、现实的、多样化的、公开的遮挡人脸识别基准，具有明确的评估协议。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了2022年国际生物识别会议（IJCB 2022）举办的遮挡人脸识别竞赛（OCFR-2022），该竞赛通过合成生成的结构感知遮挡数据集评估参赛团队的算法性能。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中人脸常因遮挡导致识别困难，现有方法在严重遮挡情况下表现不足，需构建更具挑战性的基准数据集推动算法进步。
AI.method: 竞赛方基于知名数据集合成生成结构感知遮挡样本构建测试集，参赛团队可自由使用训练数据，提交方案经统一评估协议进行测评。
AI.result: 共3支学术团队提交6份有效方案，所有方案均优于基准方法，最终形成包含多样化遮挡场景的公开基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 竞赛成功建立了具有挑战性的遮挡人脸识别基准，为后续算法研究提供了标准化测试平台和丰富数据支持。

authors_text: Jingyu Jia,Zikai Alex Wen,Zheli Liu,Changyu Dong
title: New Differential Privacy Communication Pipeline and Design Framework
title_zh: 新的差分隐私通信管道和设计框架
abstract: Organizations started to adopt differential privacy (DP) techniques hoping to persuade more users to share personal data with them. However, many users do not understand DP techniques, thus may not be willing to share. Previous research suggested that the design of DP mechanism communication could influence users' willingness to share data. Based on the prior work, we propose a new communication pipeline that starts by asking users about their privacy concerns and then provides a customized DP mechanism and communication. We also propose a design framework that systemically explores effective communication designs ranging from a text-based high-level description to a step-by-step interactive storyboard. Based on the framework, we created 17 designs and recruited five people to evaluate. Our user study showed that text-based descriptions have the highest clarity in all scenarios, while the step-by-step interactive storyboards have the potential to persuade users to trust central DP. Our future work will optimize the design and conduct a large-scale efficacy study.
summary: Organizations started to adopt differential privacy (DP) techniques hoping to persuade more users to share personal data with them. However, many users do not understand DP techniques, thus may not be willing to share. Previous research suggested that the design of DP mechanism communication could influence users' willingness to share data. Based on the prior work, we propose a new communication pipeline that starts by asking users about their privacy concerns and then provides a customized DP mechanism and communication. We also propose a design framework that systemically explores effective communication designs ranging from a text-based high-level description to a step-by-step interactive storyboard. Based on the framework, we created 17 designs and recruited five people to evaluate. Our user study showed that text-based descriptions have the highest clarity in all scenarios, while the step-by-step interactive storyboards have the potential to persuade users to trust central DP. Our future work will optimize the design and conduct a large-scale efficacy study.
abstract_zh: 组织开始采用差分隐私（DP）技术，希望说服更多用户与他们共享个人数据。然而，很多用户并不了解DP技术，因此可能不愿意分享。之前的研究表明，DP机制通信的设计会影响用户共享数据的意愿。基于之前的工作，我们提出了一种新的通信管道，首先询问用户他们的隐私问题，然后提供定制的 DP 机制和通信。我们还提出了一个设计框架，系统地探索有效的沟通设计，从基于文本的高级描述到逐步的交互式故事板。基于该框架，我们创建了 17 个设计并招募了 5 名人员进行评估。我们的用户研究表明，基于文本的描述在所有场景中都具有最高的清晰度，而分步交互式故事板有可能说服用户信任中央 DP。我们未来的工作将优化设计并进行大规模的功效研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的差分隐私通信流程和设计框架，旨在通过个性化沟通提升用户数据共享意愿。
AI.motivation: 用户对差分隐私技术缺乏理解，导致其数据共享意愿不足，而通信设计可能影响用户信任度。
AI.method: 设计包含用户隐私顾虑调研的通信流程，并构建从文本描述到交互式故事板的系统化设计框架，通过用户研究验证效果。
AI.result: 文本描述在所有场景中清晰度最高，而分步交互故事板能有效提升用户对中心化差分隐私的信任。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为差分隐私通信设计提供系统化方法，未来需优化设计并开展大规模有效性研究。

search_text: New Differential Privacy Communication Pipeline and Design Framework 新的差分隐私通信管道和设计框架 Organizations started to adopt differential privacy (DP) techniques hoping to persuade more users to share personal data with them. However, many users do not understand DP techniques, thus may not be willing to share. Previous research suggested that the design of DP mechanism communication could influence users' willingness to share data. Based on the prior work, we propose a new communication pipeline that starts by asking users about their privacy concerns and then provides a customized DP mechanism and communication. We also propose a design framework that systemically explores effective communication designs ranging from a text-based high-level description to a step-by-step interactive storyboard. Based on the framework, we created 17 designs and recruited five people to evaluate. Our user study showed that text-based descriptions have the highest clarity in all scenarios, while the step-by-step interactive storyboards have the potential to persuade users to trust central DP. Our future work will optimize the design and conduct a large-scale efficacy study. 组织开始采用差分隐私（DP）技术，希望说服更多用户与他们共享个人数据。然而，很多用户并不了解DP技术，因此可能不愿意分享。之前的研究表明，DP机制通信的设计会影响用户共享数据的意愿。基于之前的工作，我们提出了一种新的通信管道，首先询问用户他们的隐私问题，然后提供定制的 DP 机制和通信。我们还提出了一个设计框架，系统地探索有效的沟通设计，从基于文本的高级描述到逐步的交互式故事板。基于该框架，我们创建了 17 个设计并招募了 5 名人员进行评估。我们的用户研究表明，基于文本的描述在所有场景中都具有最高的清晰度，而分步交互式故事板有可能说服用户信任中央 DP。我们未来的工作将优化设计并进行大规模的功效研究。 本文提出了一种新的差分隐私通信流程和设计框架，旨在通过个性化沟通提升用户数据共享意愿。 Jingyu Jia,Zikai Alex Wen,Zheli Liu,Changyu Dong cs.HC,cs.CR

authors_text: Péter Györgyi,Tamás Kis,Tímea Tamási
title: An online joint replenishment problem combined with single machine scheduling
title_zh: 结合单机调度的在线联合补货问题
abstract: This paper considers a combination of the joint replenishment problem with single machine scheduling. There is a single resource, which is required by all the jobs, and a job can be started at time point $t$ on the machine if and only the machine does not process another job at $t$, and the resource is replenished between its release date and $t$. Each replenishment has a cost, which is independent of the amount replenished. The objective is to minimize the total replenishment cost plus the maximum flow time of the jobs. We consider the online variant of the problem, where the jobs are released over time, and once a job is inserted into the schedule, its starting time cannot be changed. We propose a deterministic 2-competitive online algorithm for the general input. Moreover, we show that for a certain class of inputs (so-called $p$-bounded input), the competitive ratio of the algorithm tends to $\sqrt{2}$ as the number of jobs tends to infinity. We also derive several lower bounds for the best competitive ratio of any deterministic online algorithm under various assumptions.
summary: This paper considers a combination of the joint replenishment problem with single machine scheduling. There is a single resource, which is required by all the jobs, and a job can be started at time point $t$ on the machine if and only the machine does not process another job at $t$, and the resource is replenished between its release date and $t$. Each replenishment has a cost, which is independent of the amount replenished. The objective is to minimize the total replenishment cost plus the maximum flow time of the jobs. We consider the online variant of the problem, where the jobs are released over time, and once a job is inserted into the schedule, its starting time cannot be changed. We propose a deterministic 2-competitive online algorithm for the general input. Moreover, we show that for a certain class of inputs (so-called $p$-bounded input), the competitive ratio of the algorithm tends to $\sqrt{2}$ as the number of jobs tends to infinity. We also derive several lower bounds for the best competitive ratio of any deterministic online algorithm under various assumptions.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑联合补货问题与单机调度的结合。有一个资源，所有作业都需要该资源，当且仅当机器在 $t$ 没有处理另一个作业时，作业才能在时间点 $t$ 在机器上启动，并且资源在其发布日期和 $t$ 之间得到补充。每次补货都有成本，该成本与补货数量无关。目标是最小化总补货成本加上作业的最大流动时间。我们考虑该问题的在线变体，其中作业随着时间的推移而释放，并且一旦将作业插入到计划中，其开始时间就无法更改。我们针对一般输入提出了一种确定性的 2-竞争在线算法。此外，我们表明，对于某一类输入（所谓的 $p$ 有界输入），随着工作数量趋于无穷大，算法的竞争比趋于 $\sqrt{2}$。我们还得出了在各种假设下任何确定性在线算法的最佳竞争比的几个下限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线联合补货问题与单机调度的结合，旨在最小化总补货成本与作业最大流程时间之和。
AI.motivation: 实际生产中资源补货与作业调度需协同优化，而现有研究多独立处理两者，缺乏对动态在线场景的有效联合策略。
AI.method: 提出一种确定性在线算法，通过动态调整补货时机与作业调度顺序，确保作业启动条件满足且成本最小化。
AI.result: 算法在一般输入下具有2-竞争比，对特定p-有界输入类，竞争比随作业数增加趋近于√2，并推导了多种假设下的算法下界。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为联合优化补货与调度提供了理论保障，尤其在p-有界场景下表现更优，同时明确了在线算法性能的理论极限。

authors_text: Zhangzi Zhu,Yu Hao,Wenqing Zhang,Chuhui Xue,Song Bai
title: Runner-Up Solution to ECCV 2022 Challenge on Out of Vocabulary Scene Text Understanding: Cropped Word Recognition
title_zh: ECCV 2022 词汇场景文本理解挑战赛亚军解决方案：裁剪词识别
abstract: This report presents our 2nd place solution to ECCV 2022 challenge on Out-of-Vocabulary Scene Text Understanding (OOV-ST) : Cropped Word Recognition. This challenge is held in the context of ECCV 2022 workshop on Text in Everything (TiE), which aims to extract out-of-vocabulary words from natural scene images. In the competition, we first pre-train SCATTER on the synthetic datasets, then fine-tune the model on the training set with data augmentations. Meanwhile, two additional models are trained specifically for long and vertical texts. Finally, we combine the output from different models with different layers, different backbones, and different seeds as the final results. Our solution achieves a word accuracy of 59.45\% when considering out-of-vocabulary words only.
summary: This report presents our 2nd place solution to ECCV 2022 challenge on Out-of-Vocabulary Scene Text Understanding (OOV-ST) : Cropped Word Recognition. This challenge is held in the context of ECCV 2022 workshop on Text in Everything (TiE), which aims to extract out-of-vocabulary words from natural scene images. In the competition, we first pre-train SCATTER on the synthetic datasets, then fine-tune the model on the training set with data augmentations. Meanwhile, two additional models are trained specifically for long and vertical texts. Finally, we combine the output from different models with different layers, different backbones, and different seeds as the final results. Our solution achieves a word accuracy of 59.45\% when considering out-of-vocabulary words only.
abstract_zh: 本报告介绍了我们在 ECCV 2022 词汇外场景文本理解 (OOV-ST) 挑战中获得第二名的解决方案：裁剪词识别。这项挑战是在 ECCV 2022 Text in Everything (TiE) 研讨会的背景下举行的，旨在从自然场景图像中提取词汇外的单词。在比赛中，我们首先在合成数据集上预训练 SCATTER，然后通过数据增强在训练集上微调模型。与此同时，另外两个模型专门针对长文本和垂直文本进行了训练。最后，我们将不同层、不同骨干网和不同种子的不同模型的输出结合起来作为最终结果。仅考虑词汇表外的单词时，我们的解决方案的单词准确率达到 59.45%。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在ECCV 2022挑战赛中获得第二名的解决方案，专注于从自然场景图像中识别超出词汇表的裁剪文字。
AI.motivation: 挑战赛旨在解决自然场景中超出标准词汇表的文本识别问题，这对实际应用中频繁出现的新词汇识别具有重要意义。
AI.method: 首先在合成数据集上预训练SCATTER模型，再通过数据增强在训练集上微调；同时训练专门处理长文本和垂直文本的模型，最终通过融合不同模型、不同层、不同主干网络和随机种子的输出结果。
AI.result: 仅考虑超出词汇表的单词时，模型的词准确率达到59.45%。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模型融合策略有效提升了超出词汇表场景文本的识别性能，验证了方法在复杂场景下的有效性。

search_text: Runner-Up Solution to ECCV 2022 Challenge on Out of Vocabulary Scene Text Understanding: Cropped Word Recognition ECCV 2022 词汇场景文本理解挑战赛亚军解决方案：裁剪词识别 This report presents our 2nd place solution to ECCV 2022 challenge on Out-of-Vocabulary Scene Text Understanding (OOV-ST) : Cropped Word Recognition. This challenge is held in the context of ECCV 2022 workshop on Text in Everything (TiE), which aims to extract out-of-vocabulary words from natural scene images. In the competition, we first pre-train SCATTER on the synthetic datasets, then fine-tune the model on the training set with data augmentations. Meanwhile, two additional models are trained specifically for long and vertical texts. Finally, we combine the output from different models with different layers, different backbones, and different seeds as the final results. Our solution achieves a word accuracy of 59.45\% when considering out-of-vocabulary words only. 本报告介绍了我们在 ECCV 2022 词汇外场景文本理解 (OOV-ST) 挑战中获得第二名的解决方案：裁剪词识别。这项挑战是在 ECCV 2022 Text in Everything (TiE) 研讨会的背景下举行的，旨在从自然场景图像中提取词汇外的单词。在比赛中，我们首先在合成数据集上预训练 SCATTER，然后通过数据增强在训练集上微调模型。与此同时，另外两个模型专门针对长文本和垂直文本进行了训练。最后，我们将不同层、不同骨干网和不同种子的不同模型的输出结合起来作为最终结果。仅考虑词汇表外的单词时，我们的解决方案的单词准确率达到 59.45%。 本文介绍了在ECCV 2022挑战赛中获得第二名的解决方案，专注于从自然场景图像中识别超出词汇表的裁剪文字。 Zhangzi Zhu,Yu Hao,Wenqing Zhang,Chuhui Xue,Song Bai cs.CV

authors_text: Mojtaba Nayyeri,Zihao Wang,Mst. Mahfuja Akter,Mirza Mohtashim Alam,Md Rashad Al Hasan Rony,Jens Lehmann,Steffen Staab
title: Integrating Knowledge Graph embedding and pretrained Language Models in Hypercomplex Spaces
title_zh: 在超复杂空间中集成知识图嵌入和预训练语言模型
abstract: Knowledge Graphs, such as Wikidata, comprise structural and textual knowledge in order to represent knowledge. For each of the two modalities dedicated approaches for graph embedding and language models learn patterns that allow for predicting novel structural knowledge. Few approaches have integrated learning and inference with both modalities and these existing ones could only partially exploit the interaction of structural and textual knowledge. In our approach, we build on existing strong representations of single modalities and we use hypercomplex algebra to represent both, (i), single-modality embedding as well as, (ii), the interaction between different modalities and their complementary means of knowledge representation. More specifically, we suggest Dihedron and Quaternion representations of 4D hypercomplex numbers to integrate four modalities namely structural knowledge graph embedding, word-level representations (e.g.\ Word2vec, Fasttext), sentence-level representations (Sentence transformer), and document-level representations (sentence transformer, Doc2vec). Our unified vector representation scores the plausibility of labelled edges via Hamilton and Dihedron products, thus modeling pairwise interactions between different modalities. Extensive experimental evaluation on standard benchmark datasets shows the superiority of our two new models using abundant textual information besides sparse structural knowledge to enhance performance in link prediction tasks.
summary: Knowledge Graphs, such as Wikidata, comprise structural and textual knowledge in order to represent knowledge. For each of the two modalities dedicated approaches for graph embedding and language models learn patterns that allow for predicting novel structural knowledge. Few approaches have integrated learning and inference with both modalities and these existing ones could only partially exploit the interaction of structural and textual knowledge. In our approach, we build on existing strong representations of single modalities and we use hypercomplex algebra to represent both, (i), single-modality embedding as well as, (ii), the interaction between different modalities and their complementary means of knowledge representation. More specifically, we suggest Dihedron and Quaternion representations of 4D hypercomplex numbers to integrate four modalities namely structural knowledge graph embedding, word-level representations (e.g.\ Word2vec, Fasttext), sentence-level representations (Sentence transformer), and document-level representations (sentence transformer, Doc2vec). Our unified vector representation scores the plausibility of labelled edges via Hamilton and Dihedron products, thus modeling pairwise interactions between different modalities. Extensive experimental evaluation on standard benchmark datasets shows the superiority of our two new models using abundant textual information besides sparse structural knowledge to enhance performance in link prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: 知识图谱，例如维基数据，包含结构知识和文本知识以表示知识。对于这两种模式中的每一种，图嵌入和语言模型的专用方法都可以学习允许预测新颖结构知识的模式。很少有方法将学习和推理与这两种模式相结合，并且这些现有的方法只能部分地利用结构知识和文本知识的相互作用。在我们的方法中，我们建立在单一模态的现有强表示的基础上，并使用超复杂代数来表示（i）单模态嵌入以及（ii）不同模态及其互补的知识表示方式之间的相互作用。更具体地说，我们建议使用 4D 超复数的二面体和四元数表示来集成四种模式，即结构知识图嵌入、单词级表示（例如 Word2vec、Fasttext）、句子级表示（句子转换器）和文档级表示（句子转换器、Doc2vec）。我们的统一向量表示通过 Hamilton 和 Dihedron 产品对标记边缘的合理性进行评分，从而对不同模态之间的成对相互作用进行建模。对标准基准数据集的广泛实验评估表明，我们的两个新模型使用丰富的文本信息和稀疏的结构知识来增强链接预测任务的性能的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在超复数空间中整合知识图谱嵌入与预训练语言模型的方法，通过四维超复数表示结构化与文本知识的交互，提升链接预测任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效融合知识图谱的结构化知识与文本信息，导致跨模态交互利用不足，需探索更高效的知识表示与整合方式。
AI.method: 采用四维超复数（Dihedron/Quaternion）构建统一向量表示，整合结构知识嵌入、词级（Word2vec/Fasttext）、句级（Sentence transformer）及文档级（Doc2vec）表示，通过哈密顿积与Dihedron积建模跨模态交互。
AI.result: 在标准基准数据集上实验表明，新模型通过结合丰富文本信息与稀疏结构知识，在链接预测任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 超复数空间有效整合多模态知识表示，验证了跨模态交互建模对链接预测的提升作用，为多模态知识融合提供新方向。

authors_text: Konrad K. Dabrowski,Peter Jonsson,Sebastian Ordyniak,George Osipov,Magnus Wahlström
title: Almost Consistent Systems of Linear Equations
title_zh: 几乎一致的线性方程组
abstract: Checking whether a system of linear equations is consistent is a basic computational problem with ubiquitous applications. When dealing with inconsistent systems, one may seek an assignment that minimizes the number of unsatisfied equations. This problem is NP-hard and UGC-hard to approximate within any constant even for two-variable equations over the two-element field. We study this problem from the point of view of parameterized complexity, with the parameter being the number of unsatisfied equations. We consider equations defined over Euclidean domains - a family of commutative rings that generalize finite and infinite fields including the rationals, the ring of integers, and many other structures. We show that if every equation contains at most two variables, the problem is fixed-parameter tractable. This generalizes many eminent graph separation problems such as Bipartization, Multiway Cut and Multicut parameterized by the size of the cutset. To complement this, we show that the problem is W[1]-hard when three or more variables are allowed in an equation, as well as for many commutative rings that are not Euclidean domains. On the technical side, we introduce the notion of important balanced subgraphs, generalizing important separators of Marx [Theor. Comput. Sci. 2006] to the setting of biased graphs. Furthermore, we use recent results on parameterized MinCSP [Kim et al., SODA 2021] to efficiently solve a generalization of Multicut with disjunctive cut requests.
summary: Checking whether a system of linear equations is consistent is a basic computational problem with ubiquitous applications. When dealing with inconsistent systems, one may seek an assignment that minimizes the number of unsatisfied equations. This problem is NP-hard and UGC-hard to approximate within any constant even for two-variable equations over the two-element field. We study this problem from the point of view of parameterized complexity, with the parameter being the number of unsatisfied equations. We consider equations defined over Euclidean domains - a family of commutative rings that generalize finite and infinite fields including the rationals, the ring of integers, and many other structures. We show that if every equation contains at most two variables, the problem is fixed-parameter tractable. This generalizes many eminent graph separation problems such as Bipartization, Multiway Cut and Multicut parameterized by the size of the cutset. To complement this, we show that the problem is W[1]-hard when three or more variables are allowed in an equation, as well as for many commutative rings that are not Euclidean domains. On the technical side, we introduce the notion of important balanced subgraphs, generalizing important separators of Marx [Theor. Comput. Sci. 2006] to the setting of biased graphs. Furthermore, we use recent results on parameterized MinCSP [Kim et al., SODA 2021] to efficiently solve a generalization of Multicut with disjunctive cut requests.
abstract_zh: 检查线性方程组是否一致是一个应用广泛的基本计算问题。当处理不一致的系统时，人们可能会寻求一种最小化不满足方程数量的分配。即使对于二元域上的二变量方程，这个问题也是 NP 困难和 UGC 困难的，无法在任何常数内进行近似。我们从参数化复杂度的角度来研究这个问题，参数是不满足方程的个数。我们考虑在欧几里得域上定义的方程 - 一系列可交换环，概括了有限域和无限域，包括有理数、整数环和许多其他结构。我们证明，如果每个方程最多包含两个变量，则该问题是固定参数可处理的。这概括了许多著名的图​​分离问题，例如二分、多路切割和通过切割集大小参数化的多重切割。为了补充这一点，我们表明，当方程中允许存在三个或更多变量时，以及对于许多非欧几里德域的交换环时，问题是 W[1]-困难的。在技​​术方面，我们引入了重要平衡子图的概念，概括了马克思[理论。计算。科学。 2006]有偏差图表的设置。此外，我们使用参数化 MinCSP [Kim 等人，SODA 2021] 的最新结果来有效地解决具有析取切割请求的 Multicut 的泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在欧几里得域上几乎一致的线性方程组问题，旨在通过参数化复杂度分析，找到使不满足方程数量最小的解。
AI.motivation: 判断线性方程组是否一致是基础计算问题，但处理不一致系统时，寻找最小化不满足方程的解是NP难的。现有方法难以高效处理，需探索参数化复杂度下的新途径。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂度理论，以不满足方程数量为参数，结合欧几里得域特性，引入重要平衡子图概念，并利用参数化MinCSP结果解决广义多割问题。
AI.result: 证明当每个方程最多含两个变量时，问题在固定参数下可解（FPT），并推广至图分割问题；而三个变量或非欧几里得域时，问题属于W[1]-难。
AI.conclusion: 问题的可解性取决于变量数量和域结构，研究为参数化复杂度理论提供了新工具，并连接了图分割与约束满足问题的前沿成果。

Furthermore, we use recent results on parameterized MinCSP [Kim et al., SODA 2021] to efficiently solve a generalization of Multicut with disjunctive cut requests. 检查线性方程组是否一致是一个应用广泛的基本计算问题。当处理不一致的系统时，人们可能会寻求一种最小化不满足方程数量的分配。即使对于二元域上的二变量方程，这个问题也是 NP 困难和 UGC 困难的，无法在任何常数内进行近似。我们从参数化复杂度的角度来研究这个问题，参数是不满足方程的个数。我们考虑在欧几里得域上定义的方程 - 一系列可交换环，概括了有限域和无限域，包括有理数、整数环和许多其他结构。我们证明，如果每个方程最多包含两个变量，则该问题是固定参数可处理的。这概括了许多著名的图​​分离问题，例如二分、多路切割和通过切割集大小参数化的多重切割。为了补充这一点，我们表明，当方程中允许存在三个或更多变量时，以及对于许多非欧几里德域的交换环时，问题是 W[1]-困难的。在技​​术方面，我们引入了重要平衡子图的概念，概括了马克思[理论。计算。科学。 2006]有偏差图表的设置。此外，我们使用参数化 MinCSP [Kim 等人，SODA 2021] 的最新结果来有效地解决具有析取切割请求的 Multicut 的泛化。 本文研究了在欧几里得域上几乎一致的线性方程组问题，旨在通过参数化复杂度分析，找到使不满足方程数量最小的解。 Konrad K. Dabrowski,Peter Jonsson,Sebastian Ordyniak,George Osipov,Magnus Wahlström cs.DS

authors_text: André F. R. Guarda,Nuno M. M. Rodrigues,Manuel Ruivo,Luís Coelho,Abdelrahman Seleem,Fernando Pereira
title: IT/IST/IPLeiria Response to the Call for Proposals on JPEG Pleno Point Cloud Coding
title_zh: IT/IST/IPLeiria 对 JPEG Pleno 点云编码提案征集的响应
comment: 52 pages, 8 figures. Document submitted to the 96th ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 29/WG 1 (JPEG) meeting
comments: 52 pages, 8 figures. Document submitted to the 96th ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 29/WG 1 (JPEG) meeting
abstract: This document describes a deep learning-based point cloud geometry codec and a deep learning-based point cloud joint geometry and colour codec, submitted to the Call for Proposals on JPEG Pleno Point Cloud Coding issued in January 2022. The proposed codecs are based on recent developments in deep learning-based PC geometry coding and offer some of the key functionalities targeted by the Call for Proposals. The proposed geometry codec offers a compression efficiency that outperforms the MPEG G-PCC standard and outperforms or is competitive with the V-PCC Intra standard for the JPEG Call for Proposals test set; however, the same does not happen for the joint geometry and colour codec due to a quality saturation effect that needs to be overcome.
summary: This document describes a deep learning-based point cloud geometry codec and a deep learning-based point cloud joint geometry and colour codec, submitted to the Call for Proposals on JPEG Pleno Point Cloud Coding issued in January 2022. The proposed codecs are based on recent developments in deep learning-based PC geometry coding and offer some of the key functionalities targeted by the Call for Proposals. The proposed geometry codec offers a compression efficiency that outperforms the MPEG G-PCC standard and outperforms or is competitive with the V-PCC Intra standard for the JPEG Call for Proposals test set; however, the same does not happen for the joint geometry and colour codec due to a quality saturation effect that needs to be overcome.
abstract_zh: 本文档描述了一种基于深度学习的点云几何编解码器以及一种基于深度学习的点云联合几何和颜色编解码器，已提交给 2022 年 1 月发布的 JPEG Pleno 点云编码提案征集。所提出的编解码器基于基于深度学习的 PC 几何编码的最新发展，并提供提案征集所针对的一些关键功能。所提出的几何编解码器提供的压缩效率优于 MPEG G-PCC 标准，并且优于或与 JPEG Call for Proposals 测试集的 V-PCC Intra 标准竞争；然而，由于需要克服质量饱和效应，关节几何和颜色编解码器不会发生同样的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的点云几何编码器和联合几何-颜色编码器，响应JPEG Pleno点云编码提案征集。
AI.motivation: 现有点云编码标准（如MPEG G-PCC/V-PCC）在压缩效率和质量上存在提升空间，需探索深度学习方法突破质量饱和限制。
AI.method: 设计深度学习框架分别处理点云几何信息和联合几何-颜色信息，采用神经网络模型进行特征提取与压缩。
AI.result: 几何编码器压缩效率超越MPEG G-PCC且优于V-PCC Intra，但联合编码器因质量饱和效应未达预期效果。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在点云几何编码中表现优异，但需进一步优化联合编码模型以解决质量饱和问题。

authors_text: Zhilei Chen,Honghua Chen,Lina Gong,Xuefeng Yan,Jun Wang,Yanwen Guo,Jing Qin,Mingqiang Wei
title: UTOPIC: Uncertainty-aware Overlap Prediction Network for Partial Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: UTOPIC：用于部分点云配准的不确定性感知重叠预测网络
abstract: High-confidence overlap prediction and accurate correspondences are critical for cutting-edge models to align paired point clouds in a partial-to-partial manner. However, there inherently exists uncertainty between the overlapping and non-overlapping regions, which has always been neglected and significantly affects the registration performance. Beyond the current wisdom, we propose a novel uncertainty-aware overlap prediction network, dubbed UTOPIC, to tackle the ambiguous overlap prediction problem; to our knowledge, this is the first to explicitly introduce overlap uncertainty to point cloud registration. Moreover, we induce the feature extractor to implicitly perceive the shape knowledge through a completion decoder, and present a geometric relation embedding for Transformer to obtain transformation-invariant geometry-aware feature representations. With the merits of more reliable overlap scores and more precise dense correspondences, UTOPIC can achieve stable and accurate registration results, even for the inputs with limited overlapping areas. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on synthetic and real benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our approach over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: High-confidence overlap prediction and accurate correspondences are critical for cutting-edge models to align paired point clouds in a partial-to-partial manner. However, there inherently exists uncertainty between the overlapping and non-overlapping regions, which has always been neglected and significantly affects the registration performance. Beyond the current wisdom, we propose a novel uncertainty-aware overlap prediction network, dubbed UTOPIC, to tackle the ambiguous overlap prediction problem; to our knowledge, this is the first to explicitly introduce overlap uncertainty to point cloud registration. Moreover, we induce the feature extractor to implicitly perceive the shape knowledge through a completion decoder, and present a geometric relation embedding for Transformer to obtain transformation-invariant geometry-aware feature representations. With the merits of more reliable overlap scores and more precise dense correspondences, UTOPIC can achieve stable and accurate registration results, even for the inputs with limited overlapping areas. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on synthetic and real benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our approach over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 高置信度的重叠预测和准确的对应关系对于尖端模型以部分对部分的方式对齐配对点云至关重要。然而，重叠区域和非重叠区域之间本质上存在不确定性，这一点一直被忽视并显着影响配准性能。超越当前的智慧，我们提出了一种新颖的不确定性感知重叠预测网络，称为 UTOPIC，来解决模糊重叠预测问题；据我们所知，这是第一个明确引入点云配准重叠不确定性的方法。此外，我们诱导特征提取器通过完成解码器隐式感知形状知识，并为 Transformer 提供几何关系嵌入以获得变换不变的几何感知特征表示。凭借更可靠的重叠分数和更精确的密集对应的优点，即使对于重叠区域有限的输入，UTOPIC 也可以实现稳定且准确的配准结果。对合成和真实基准进行的广泛的定量和定性实验证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UTOPIC网络，通过显式引入重叠不确定性解决部分点云配准中的重叠预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了点云重叠与非重叠区域间的固有不确定性，导致配准性能下降。
AI.method: 设计不确定性感知的重叠预测网络，结合补全解码器与几何关系嵌入的Transformer结构，实现变换不变的特征表示。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在重叠区域有限时表现出更稳定的配准精度。
AI.conclusion: UTOPIC通过可靠重叠评分与精确对应关系，验证了不确定性建模对部分点云配准的关键作用。

authors_text: Pranjal Awasthi,Alex Tang,Aravindan Vijayaraghavan
title: Agnostic Learning of General ReLU Activation Using Gradient Descent
title_zh: 使用梯度下降的一般 ReLU 激活的不可知学习
abstract: We provide a convergence analysis of gradient descent for the problem of agnostically learning a single ReLU function with moderate bias under Gaussian distributions. Unlike prior work that studies the setting of zero bias, we consider the more challenging scenario when the bias of the ReLU function is non-zero. Our main result establishes that starting from random initialization, in a polynomial number of iterations gradient descent outputs, with high probability, a ReLU function that achieves an error that is within a constant factor of the optimal error of the best ReLU function with moderate bias. We also provide finite sample guarantees, and these techniques generalize to a broader class of marginal distributions beyond Gaussians.
summary: We provide a convergence analysis of gradient descent for the problem of agnostically learning a single ReLU function with moderate bias under Gaussian distributions. Unlike prior work that studies the setting of zero bias, we consider the more challenging scenario when the bias of the ReLU function is non-zero. Our main result establishes that starting from random initialization, in a polynomial number of iterations gradient descent outputs, with high probability, a ReLU function that achieves an error that is within a constant factor of the optimal error of the best ReLU function with moderate bias. We also provide finite sample guarantees, and these techniques generalize to a broader class of marginal distributions beyond Gaussians.
abstract_zh: 我们针对在高斯分布下不可知地学习具有中等偏差的单个 ReLU 函数的问题提供了梯度下降的收敛分析。与研究零偏差设置的先前工作不同，我们考虑当 ReLU 函数的偏差非零时更具挑战性的场景。我们的主要结果表明，从随机初始化开始，在多项式迭代梯度下降输出中，ReLU 函数以高概率实现误差，该误差在具有适度偏差的最佳 ReLU 函数的最佳误差的常数因子内。我们还提供有限样本保证，并且这些技术可以推广到高斯之外更广泛的边际分布。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在高斯分布下使用梯度下降法对具有中等偏差的单个ReLU函数进行无偏学习的收敛性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于零偏差的ReLU函数，但实际问题中偏差可能非零，需更一般化的理论分析。
AI.method: 通过梯度下降法的收敛性分析，结合高斯分布假设及有限样本保证，并推广至更广泛的分布类别。
AI.result: 证明从随机初始化出发，梯度下降在多项式迭代次数内可输出误差接近最优解常数因子的ReLU函数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为非零偏差ReLU函数的无偏学习提供了理论保证，且适用于更广泛的分布场景。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法为非零偏差ReLU函数的无偏学习提供了理论保证，且适用于更广泛的分布场景。

tldr: 本文研究了在高斯分布下使用梯度下降法对具有中等偏差的单个ReLU函数进行无偏学习的收敛性问题。
motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于零偏差的ReLU函数，但实际问题中偏差可能非零，需更一般化的理论分析。
method: 通过梯度下降法的收敛性分析，结合高斯分布假设及有限样本保证，并推广至更广泛的分布类别。
result: 证明从随机初始化出发，梯度下降在多项式迭代次数内可输出误差接近最优解常数因子的ReLU函数。
conclusion: 该方法为非零偏差ReLU函数的无偏学习提供了理论保证，且适用于更广泛的分布场景。
search_text: Agnostic Learning of General ReLU Activation Using Gradient Descent 使用梯度下降的一般 ReLU 激活的不可知学习 We provide a convergence analysis of gradient descent for the problem of agnostically learning a single ReLU function with moderate bias under Gaussian distributions. Unlike prior work that studies the setting of zero bias, we consider the more challenging scenario when the bias of the ReLU function is non-zero. Our main result establishes that starting from random initialization, in a polynomial number of iterations gradient descent outputs, with high probability, a ReLU function that achieves an error that is within a constant factor of the optimal error of the best ReLU function with moderate bias. We also provide finite sample guarantees, and these techniques generalize to a broader class of marginal distributions beyond Gaussians. 我们针对在高斯分布下不可知地学习具有中等偏差的单个 ReLU 函数的问题提供了梯度下降的收敛分析。与研究零偏差设置的先前工作不同，我们考虑当 ReLU 函数的偏差非零时更具挑战性的场景。我们的主要结果表明，从随机初始化开始，在多项式迭代梯度下降输出中，ReLU 函数以高概率实现误差，该误差在具有适度偏差的最佳 ReLU 函数的最佳误差的常数因子内。我们还提供有限样本保证，并且这些技术可以推广到高斯之外更广泛的边际分布。 本文研究了在高斯分布下使用梯度下降法对具有中等偏差的单个ReLU函数进行无偏学习的收敛性问题。 Pranjal Awasthi,Alex Tang,Aravindan Vijayaraghavan cs.LG,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Tahir Hassan,Aras Asaad,Dashti Ali,Sabah Jassim
title: Artificial Image Tampering Distorts Spatial Distribution of Texture Landmarks and Quality Characteristics
title_zh: 人工图像篡改扭曲纹理标志和质量特征的空间分布
abstract: Advances in AI based computer vision has led to a significant growth in synthetic image generation and artificial image tampering with serious implications for unethical exploitations that undermine person identification and could make render AI predictions less explainable.Morphing, Deepfake and other artificial generation of face photographs undermine the reliability of face biometrics authentication using different electronic ID documents.Morphed face photographs on e-passports can fool automated border control systems and human guards.This paper extends our previous work on using the persistent homology (PH) of texture landmarks to detect morphing attacks.We demonstrate that artificial image tampering distorts the spatial distribution of texture landmarks (i.e. their PH) as well as that of a set of image quality characteristics.We shall demonstrate that the tamper caused distortion of these two slim feature vectors provide significant potentials for building explainable (Handcrafted) tamper detectors with low error rates and suitable for implementation on constrained devices.
summary: Advances in AI based computer vision has led to a significant growth in synthetic image generation and artificial image tampering with serious implications for unethical exploitations that undermine person identification and could make render AI predictions less explainable.Morphing, Deepfake and other artificial generation of face photographs undermine the reliability of face biometrics authentication using different electronic ID documents.Morphed face photographs on e-passports can fool automated border control systems and human guards.This paper extends our previous work on using the persistent homology (PH) of texture landmarks to detect morphing attacks.We demonstrate that artificial image tampering distorts the spatial distribution of texture landmarks (i.e. their PH) as well as that of a set of image quality characteristics.We shall demonstrate that the tamper caused distortion of these two slim feature vectors provide significant potentials for building explainable (Handcrafted) tamper detectors with low error rates and suitable for implementation on constrained devices.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能的计算机视觉的进步导致合成图像生成和人工图像篡改的显着增长，对不道德的利用产生了严重影响，破坏了个人身份识别，并可能使人工智能预测变得难以解释。变形、深度伪造和其他人工生成的面部照片破坏了使用不同电子身份证件的面部生物识别认证的可靠性。电子护照上的变形面部照片可以欺骗自动边境控制系统和人类警卫。本文扩展了我们之前关于使用持久同源性（PH）的工作纹理地标来检测变形攻击。我们证明人工图像篡改会扭曲纹理地标（即它们的 PH）以及一组图像质量特征的空间分布。我们将证明篡改导致的这两个细长特征向量的失真为构建可解释（手工制作）的篡改检测器提供了巨大的潜力，该检测器具有低错误率并适合在受限设备上实现。

AI.tldr: 本文研究人工图像篡改对纹理标志点空间分布和图像质量特征的影响，提出基于持续同调（PH）的检测方法。
AI.motivation: AI生成图像技术威胁人脸识别系统安全，需开发可解释且适用于受限设备的篡改检测方法。
AI.method: 通过分析纹理标志点的持续同调（PH）及图像质量特征向量的扭曲，构建低误报率的检测模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，篡改导致的特征扭曲可有效用于构建可解释的检测器，适合部署于资源受限设备。
AI.conclusion: 结合纹理标志点与质量特征的PH分析，能有效检测人工图像篡改，提升检测系统的可解释性与实用性。

authors_text: Yao-Chih Lee,Kuan-Wei Tseng,Guan-Sheng Chen,Chu-Song Chen
title: Globally Consistent Video Depth and Pose Estimation with Efficient Test-Time Training
title_zh: 通过高效的测试时训练进行全局一致的视频深度和姿势估计
abstract: Dense depth and pose estimation is a vital prerequisite for various video applications. Traditional solutions suffer from the robustness of sparse feature tracking and insufficient camera baselines in videos. Therefore, recent methods utilize learning-based optical flow and depth prior to estimate dense depth. However, previous works require heavy computation time or yield sub-optimal depth results. We present GCVD, a globally consistent method for learning-based video structure from motion (SfM) in this paper. GCVD integrates a compact pose graph into the CNN-based optimization to achieve globally consistent estimation from an effective keyframe selection mechanism. It can improve the robustness of learning-based methods with flow-guided keyframes and well-established depth prior. Experimental results show that GCVD outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both depth and pose estimation. Besides, the runtime experiments reveal that it provides strong efficiency in both short- and long-term videos with global consistency provided.
summary: Dense depth and pose estimation is a vital prerequisite for various video applications. Traditional solutions suffer from the robustness of sparse feature tracking and insufficient camera baselines in videos. Therefore, recent methods utilize learning-based optical flow and depth prior to estimate dense depth. However, previous works require heavy computation time or yield sub-optimal depth results. We present GCVD, a globally consistent method for learning-based video structure from motion (SfM) in this paper. GCVD integrates a compact pose graph into the CNN-based optimization to achieve globally consistent estimation from an effective keyframe selection mechanism. It can improve the robustness of learning-based methods with flow-guided keyframes and well-established depth prior. Experimental results show that GCVD outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both depth and pose estimation. Besides, the runtime experiments reveal that it provides strong efficiency in both short- and long-term videos with global consistency provided.
abstract_zh: 密集深度和姿态估计是各种视频应用的重要先决条件。传统解决方案受到稀疏特征跟踪的鲁棒性和视频中相机基线不足的影响。因此，最近的方法在估计密集深度之前利用基于学习的光流和深度。然而，以前的工作需要大量的计算时间或产生次优的深度结果。我们在本文中提出了 GCVD，一种全球一致的基于运动学习的视频结构 (SfM) 的方法。 GCVD 将紧凑的姿态图集成到基于 CNN 的优化中，以通过有效的关键帧选择机制实现全局一致的估计。它可以通过流程引导关键帧和完善的深度先验来提高基于学习的方法的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，GCVD 在深度和姿态估计方面均优于最先进的方法。此外，运行时实验表明，它在短期和长期视频中都提供了强大的效率，并提供了全局一致性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的方法GCVD，用于在视频中实现全局一致的深度和姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法存在稀疏特征跟踪鲁棒性差和相机基线不足的问题，现有方法计算量大或深度结果不理想。
AI.method: GCVD结合紧凑的姿态图与CNN优化，通过有效关键帧选择机制，利用光流引导的关键帧和成熟的深度先验提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明GCVD在深度和姿态估计上优于现有方法，且在短长期视频中具有高效运行效率。
AI.conclusion: GCVD为基于学习的视频SfM提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Amogh Joshi,Dario Guevara,Mason Earles
title: Standardizing and Centralizing Datasets to Enable Efficient Training of Agricultural Deep Learning Models
title_zh: 标准化和集中数据集以实现农业深度学习模型的高效训练
abstract: In recent years, deep learning models have become the standard for agricultural computer vision. Such models are typically fine-tuned to agricultural tasks using model weights that were originally fit to more general, non-agricultural datasets. This lack of agriculture-specific fine-tuning potentially increases training time and resource use, and decreases model performance, leading an overall decrease in data efficiency. To overcome this limitation, we collect a wide range of existing public datasets for three distinct tasks, standardize them, and construct standard training and evaluation pipelines, providing us with a set of benchmarks and pretrained models. We then conduct a number of experiments using methods which are commonly used in deep learning tasks, but unexplored in their domain-specific applications for agriculture. Our experiments guide us in developing a number of approaches to improve data efficiency when training agricultural deep learning models, without large-scale modifications to existing pipelines. Our results demonstrate that even slight training modifications, such as using agricultural pretrained model weights, or adopting specific spatial augmentations into data processing pipelines, can significantly boost model performance and result in shorter convergence time, saving training resources. Furthermore, we find that even models trained on low-quality annotations can produce comparable levels of performance to their high-quality equivalents, suggesting that datasets with poor annotations can still be used for training, expanding the pool of currently available datasets. Our methods are broadly applicable throughout agricultural deep learning, and present high potential for significant data efficiency improvements.
summary: In recent years, deep learning models have become the standard for agricultural computer vision. Such models are typically fine-tuned to agricultural tasks using model weights that were originally fit to more general, non-agricultural datasets. This lack of agriculture-specific fine-tuning potentially increases training time and resource use, and decreases model performance, leading an overall decrease in data efficiency. To overcome this limitation, we collect a wide range of existing public datasets for three distinct tasks, standardize them, and construct standard training and evaluation pipelines, providing us with a set of benchmarks and pretrained models. We then conduct a number of experiments using methods which are commonly used in deep learning tasks, but unexplored in their domain-specific applications for agriculture. Our experiments guide us in developing a number of approaches to improve data efficiency when training agricultural deep learning models, without large-scale modifications to existing pipelines. Our results demonstrate that even slight training modifications, such as using agricultural pretrained model weights, or adopting specific spatial augmentations into data processing pipelines, can significantly boost model performance and result in shorter convergence time, saving training resources. Furthermore, we find that even models trained on low-quality annotations can produce comparable levels of performance to their high-quality equivalents, suggesting that datasets with poor annotations can still be used for training, expanding the pool of currently available datasets. Our methods are broadly applicable throughout agricultural deep learning, and present high potential for significant data efficiency improvements.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习模型已成为农业计算机视觉的标准。此类模型通常使用最初适合更通用的非农业数据集的模型权重来针对农业任务进行微调。缺乏针对农业的微调可能会增加训练时间和资源使用，并降低模型性能，导致数据效率总体下降。为了克服这一限制，我们为三个不同的任务收集了广泛的现有公共数据集，对它们进行标准化，并构建标准的训练和评估管道，为我们提供了一组基准和预训练模型。然后，我们使用深度学习任务中常用的方法进行了许多实验，但在农业特定领域的应用中尚未探索。我们的实验指导我们在训练农业深度学习模型时开发多种方法来提高数据效率，而无需对现有管道进行大规模修改。我们的结果表明，即使是轻微的训练修改，例如使用农业预训练模型权重，或在数据处理管道中采用特定的空间增强，也可以显着提高模型性能并缩短收敛时间，从而节省训练资源。此外，我们发现，即使是在低质量注释上训练的模型也可以产生与高质量同等水平相当的性能水平，这表明注释较差的数据集仍然可以用于训练，从而扩大了当前可用数据集的池。我们的方法广泛适用于整个农业深度学习，并且具有显着提高数据效率的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 通过标准化和集中农业数据集，提升农业深度学习模型的训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有农业模型依赖非农业数据预训练，导致训练效率低、资源消耗大且性能不足。
AI.method: 收集并标准化多任务农业数据集，构建统一训练评估流程，实验验证数据增强与预训练权重优化方法。
AI.result: 微调与空间增强等方法显著提升模型性能并缩短收敛时间，低质量标注数据亦可达到较高效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的标准化方法与优化策略可广泛应用于农业深度学习，显著提升数据效率。

search_text: Standardizing and Centralizing Datasets to Enable Efficient Training of Agricultural Deep Learning Models 标准化和集中数据集以实现农业深度学习模型的高效训练 In recent years, deep learning models have become the standard for agricultural computer vision. Such models are typically fine-tuned to agricultural tasks using model weights that were originally fit to more general, non-agricultural datasets. This lack of agriculture-specific fine-tuning potentially increases training time and resource use, and decreases model performance, leading an overall decrease in data efficiency. To overcome this limitation, we collect a wide range of existing public datasets for three distinct tasks, standardize them, and construct standard training and evaluation pipelines, providing us with a set of benchmarks and pretrained models. We then conduct a number of experiments using methods which are commonly used in deep learning tasks, but unexplored in their domain-specific applications for agriculture. Our experiments guide us in developing a number of approaches to improve data efficiency when training agricultural deep learning models, without large-scale modifications to existing pipelines. Our results demonstrate that even slight training modifications, such as using agricultural pretrained model weights, or adopting specific spatial augmentations into data processing pipelines, can significantly boost model performance and result in shorter convergence time, saving training resources. Furthermore, we find that even models trained on low-quality annotations can produce comparable levels of performance to their high-quality equivalents, suggesting that datasets with poor annotations can still be used for training, expanding the pool of currently available datasets. Our methods are broadly applicable throughout agricultural deep learning, and present high potential for significant data efficiency improvements. 近年来，深度学习模型已成为农业计算机视觉的标准。此类模型通常使用最初适合更通用的非农业数据集的模型权重来针对农业任务进行微调。缺乏针对农业的微调可能会增加训练时间和资源使用，并降低模型性能，导致数据效率总体下降。为了克服这一限制，我们为三个不同的任务收集了广泛的现有公共数据集，对它们进行标准化，并构建标准的训练和评估管道，为我们提供了一组基准和预训练模型。然后，我们使用深度学习任务中常用的方法进行了许多实验，但在农业特定领域的应用中尚未探索。我们的实验指导我们在训练农业深度学习模型时开发多种方法来提高数据效率，而无需对现有管道进行大规模修改。我们的结果表明，即使是轻微的训练修改，例如使用农业预训练模型权重，或在数据处理管道中采用特定的空间增强，也可以显着提高模型性能并缩短收敛时间，从而节省训练资源。此外，我们发现，即使是在低质量注释上训练的模型也可以产生与高质量同等水平相当的性能水平，这表明注释较差的数据集仍然可以用于训练，从而扩大了当前可用数据集的池。我们的方法广泛适用于整个农业深度学习，并且具有显着提高数据效率的巨大潜力。 通过标准化和集中农业数据集，提升农业深度学习模型的训练效率。 Amogh Joshi,Dario Guevara,Mason Earles cs.CV

authors_text: Huajian Huang,Yingshu Chen,Tianjia Zhang,Sai-Kit Yeung
title: 360Roam: Real-Time Indoor Roaming Using Geometry-Aware 360$^\circ$ Radiance Fields
title_zh: 360Roam：使用几何感知 360$^\circ$ 辐射场进行实时室内漫游
abstract: Virtual tour among sparse 360$^\circ$ images is widely used while hindering smooth and immersive roaming experiences. The emergence of Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has showcased significant progress in synthesizing novel views, unlocking the potential for immersive scene exploration. Nevertheless, previous NeRF works primarily focused on object-centric scenarios, resulting in noticeable performance degradation when applied to outward-facing and large-scale scenes due to limitations in scene parameterization. To achieve seamless and real-time indoor roaming, we propose a novel approach using geometry-aware radiance fields with adaptively assigned local radiance fields. Initially, we employ multiple 360$^\circ$ images of an indoor scene to progressively reconstruct explicit geometry in the form of a probabilistic occupancy map, derived from a global omnidirectional radiance field. Subsequently, we assign local radiance fields through an adaptive divide-and-conquer strategy based on the recovered geometry. By incorporating geometry-aware sampling and decomposition of the global radiance field, our system effectively utilizes positional encoding and compact neural networks to enhance rendering quality and speed. Additionally, the extracted floorplan of the scene aids in providing visual guidance, contributing to a realistic roaming experience. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our system, we curated a diverse dataset of 360$^\circ$ images encompassing various real-life scenes, on which we conducted extensive experiments. Quantitative and qualitative comparisons against baseline approaches illustrated the superior performance of our system in large-scale indoor scene roaming.
summary: Virtual tour among sparse 360$^\circ$ images is widely used while hindering smooth and immersive roaming experiences. The emergence of Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) has showcased significant progress in synthesizing novel views, unlocking the potential for immersive scene exploration. Nevertheless, previous NeRF works primarily focused on object-centric scenarios, resulting in noticeable performance degradation when applied to outward-facing and large-scale scenes due to limitations in scene parameterization. To achieve seamless and real-time indoor roaming, we propose a novel approach using geometry-aware radiance fields with adaptively assigned local radiance fields. Initially, we employ multiple 360$^\circ$ images of an indoor scene to progressively reconstruct explicit geometry in the form of a probabilistic occupancy map, derived from a global omnidirectional radiance field. Subsequently, we assign local radiance fields through an adaptive divide-and-conquer strategy based on the recovered geometry. By incorporating geometry-aware sampling and decomposition of the global radiance field, our system effectively utilizes positional encoding and compact neural networks to enhance rendering quality and speed. Additionally, the extracted floorplan of the scene aids in providing visual guidance, contributing to a realistic roaming experience. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our system, we curated a diverse dataset of 360$^\circ$ images encompassing various real-life scenes, on which we conducted extensive experiments. Quantitative and qualitative comparisons against baseline approaches illustrated the superior performance of our system in large-scale indoor scene roaming.
abstract_zh: 稀疏的 360$^\circ$ 图像中的虚拟漫游被广泛使用，但阻碍了流畅和身临其境的漫游体验。神经辐射场（NeRF）的出现展示了合成新颖视图方面的重大进展，释放了沉浸式场景探索的潜力。然而，之前的 NeRF 工作主要集中在以对象为中心的场景，由于场景参数化的限制，当应用于面向外的大规模场景时，导致性能明显下降。为了实现无缝和实时的室内漫游，我们提出了一种使用几何感知辐射场和自适应分配的局部辐射场的新颖方法。最初，我们采用室内场景的多个 360$^\circ$ 图像，以从全局全向辐射场导出的概率占用图的形式逐步重建显式几何形状。随后，我们通过基于恢复的几何形状的自适应分而治之策略来分配局部辐射场。通过结合全局辐射场的几何感知采样和分解，我们的系统有效地利用位置编码和紧凑的神经网络来提高渲染质量和速度。此外，提取的场景平面图有助于提供视觉引导，有助于实现逼真的漫游体验。为了证明我们系统的有效性，我们策划了包含各种现实生活场景的 360$^\circ$ 图像的多样化数据集，并在其上进行了广泛的实验。与基线方法的定量和定性比较说明了我们的系统在大规模室内场景漫游中的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出360Roam方法，通过几何感知的360度辐射场实现实时室内漫游。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法在处理大规模和外向场景时性能下降，且虚拟导览中稀疏360度图像难以提供流畅沉浸体验。
AI.method: 基于多张360度图像重建概率占用地图，通过自适应划分策略分配局部辐射场，结合几何感知采样与全局辐射场分解，利用位置编码和紧凑神经网络提升渲染效率。
AI.result: 在包含多种真实场景的数据集上实验表明，系统在大规模室内场景漫游中优于基线方法，定性和定量结果均验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过几何感知的辐射场划分策略，解决了NeRF在大规模场景中的局限性，实现了高质量实时室内漫游。

authors_text: Guilherme P. B. Garcia,Carlos H. Grohmann,Lucas P. Soares,Mateus Espadoto
title: Relict landslide detection using Deep-Learning architectures for image segmentation in rainforest areas: A new framework
title_zh: 使用深度学习架构进行雨林地区图像分割的遗迹滑坡检测：一个新框架
abstract: Landslides are destructive and recurrent natural disasters on steep slopes and represent a risk to lives and properties. Knowledge of relict landslides location is vital to understand their mechanisms, update inventory maps and improve risk assessment. However, relict landslide mapping is complex in tropical regions covered with rainforest vegetation. A new CNN framework is proposed for semi-automatic detection of relict landslides, which uses a dataset generated by a k-means clustering algorithm and has a pre-training step. The weights computed in the pre-training are used to fine-tune the CNN training process. A comparison between the proposed and the standard framework is performed using CBERS-04A WPM images. Three CNNs for semantic segmentation are used (Unet, FPN, Linknet) with two augmented datasets. A total of 42 combinations of CNNs are tested. Values of precision and recall were very similar between the combinations tested. Recall was higher than 75% for every combination, but precision values were usually smaller than 20%. False positives (FP) samples were addressed as the cause for these low precision values. Predictions of the proposed framework were more accurate and correctly detected more landslides. This work demonstrates that there are limitations for detecting relict landslides in areas covered with rainforest, mainly related to similarities between the spectral response of pastures and deforested areas with Gleichenella sp. ferns, commonly used as an indicator of landslide scars.

This work demonstrates that there are limitations for detecting relict landslides in areas covered with rainforest, mainly related to similarities between the spectral response of pastures and deforested areas with Gleichenella sp. ferns, commonly used as an indicator of landslide scars.
abstract_zh: 山体滑坡是陡坡上经常发生的破坏性自然灾害，对生命和财产构成威胁。了解残余山体滑坡的位置对于了解其机制、更新库存地图和改进风险评估至关重要。然而，在雨林植被覆盖的热带地区，遗迹滑坡测绘工作非常复杂。提出了一种新的 CNN 框架，用于半自动检测遗迹滑坡，该框架使用 k 均值聚类算法生成的数据集，并具有预训练步骤。预训练中计算的权重用于微调 CNN 训练过程。使用 CBERS-04A WPM 图像对建议框架和标准框架进行比较。使用三个用于语义分割的 CNN（Unet、FPN、Linknet）和两个增强数据集。总共测试了 42 种 CNN 组合。测试的组合之间的精确度和召回率值非常相似。每个组合的召回率均高于 75%，但精度值通常小于 20%。误报 (FP) 样本被认为是造成这些低精度值的原因。所提出的框架的预测更加准确，并且正确地检测到了更多的山体滑坡。这项工作表明，在雨林覆盖的地区检测残余山体滑坡存在局限性，主要与牧场和森林砍伐地区的 Gleichenella sp. 光谱响应之间的相似性有关。蕨类植物，通常用作山体滑坡疤痕的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的半自动框架，用于在雨林地区检测遗留滑坡，通过改进CNN模型和数据集生成方法提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 雨林植被覆盖使遗留滑坡测绘复杂，传统方法效率低且精度不足，需开发新方法应对光谱响应相似性导致的误判问题。
AI.method: 构建包含k-means聚类生成数据集的预训练CNN框架，使用Unet、FPN、Linknet三种网络与增强数据集进行42组组合实验，对比标准框架性能。
AI.result: 所有组合召回率均超75%，但精确率普遍低于20%，假阳性主导精度问题；新框架在滑坡检测准确率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 雨林区遗留滑坡检测受限于牧场与蕨类植被光谱相似性，需结合多源数据和更精细的特征区分方法提升精度。

search_text: Relict landslide detection using Deep-Learning architectures for image segmentation in rainforest areas: A new framework 使用深度学习架构进行雨林地区图像分割的遗迹滑坡检测：一个新框架 Landslides are destructive and recurrent natural disasters on steep slopes and represent a risk to lives and properties. Knowledge of relict landslides location is vital to understand their mechanisms, update inventory maps and improve risk assessment. However, relict landslide mapping is complex in tropical regions covered with rainforest vegetation. A new CNN framework is proposed for semi-automatic detection of relict landslides, which uses a dataset generated by a k-means clustering algorithm and has a pre-training step. The weights computed in the pre-training are used to fine-tune the CNN training process. A comparison between the proposed and the standard framework is performed using CBERS-04A WPM images. Three CNNs for semantic segmentation are used (Unet, FPN, Linknet) with two augmented datasets. A total of 42 combinations of CNNs are tested. Values of precision and recall were very similar between the combinations tested. Recall was higher than 75% for every combination, but precision values were usually smaller than 20%. False positives (FP) samples were addressed as the cause for these low precision values. Predictions of the proposed framework were more accurate and correctly detected more landslides. This work demonstrates that there are limitations for detecting relict landslides in areas covered with rainforest, mainly related to similarities between the spectral response of pastures and deforested areas with Gleichenella sp. ferns, commonly used as an indicator of landslide scars. 山体滑坡是陡坡上经常发生的破坏性自然灾害，对生命和财产构成威胁。了解残余山体滑坡的位置对于了解其机制、更新库存地图和改进风险评估至关重要。然而，在雨林植被覆盖的热带地区，遗迹滑坡测绘工作非常复杂。提出了一种新的 CNN 框架，用于半自动检测遗迹滑坡，该框架使用 k 均值聚类算法生成的数据集，并具有预训练步骤。预训练中计算的权重用于微调 CNN 训练过程。使用 CBERS-04A WPM 图像对建议框架和标准框架进行比较。使用三个用于语义分割的 CNN（Unet、FPN、Linknet）和两个增强数据集。总共测试了 42 种 CNN 组合。测试的组合之间的精确度和召回率值非常相似。每个组合的召回率均高于 75%，但精度值通常小于 20%。误报 (FP) 样本被认为是造成这些低精度值的原因。所提出的框架的预测更加准确，并且正确地检测到了更多的山体滑坡。这项工作表明，在雨林覆盖的地区检测残余山体滑坡存在局限性，主要与牧场和森林砍伐地区的 Gleichenella sp. 光谱响应之间的相似性有关。蕨类植物，通常用作山体滑坡疤痕的指标。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的半自动框架，用于在雨林地区检测遗留滑坡，通过改进CNN模型和数据集生成方法提升检测精度。 Guilherme P. authors_text: Carlo Bono,Mehmet Oğuz Mülâyim,Cinzia Cappiello,Mark Carman,Jesus Cerquides,Jose Luis Fernandez-Marquez,Rosy Mondardini,Edoardo Ramalli,Barbara Pernici
title: Analyzing social media with crowdsourcing in Crowd4SDG
title_zh: 在 Crowd4SDG 中通过众包分析社交媒体
abstract: Social media have the potential to provide timely information about emergency situations and sudden events. However, finding relevant information among millions of posts being posted every day can be difficult, and developing a data analysis project usually requires time and technical skills. This study presents an approach that provides flexible support for analyzing social media, particularly during emergencies. Different use cases in which social media analysis can be adopted are introduced, and the challenges of retrieving information from large sets of posts are discussed. The focus is on analyzing images and text contained in social media posts and a set of automatic data processing tools for filtering, classification, and geolocation of content with a human-in-the-loop approach to support the data analyst. Such support includes both feedback and suggestions to configure automated tools, and crowdsourcing to gather inputs from citizens. The results are validated by discussing three case studies developed within the Crowd4SDG H2020 European project.
summary: Social media have the potential to provide timely information about emergency situations and sudden events. However, finding relevant information among millions of posts being posted every day can be difficult, and developing a data analysis project usually requires time and technical skills. This study presents an approach that provides flexible support for analyzing social media, particularly during emergencies. Different use cases in which social media analysis can be adopted are introduced, and the challenges of retrieving information from large sets of posts are discussed. The focus is on analyzing images and text contained in social media posts and a set of automatic data processing tools for filtering, classification, and geolocation of content with a human-in-the-loop approach to support the data analyst. Such support includes both feedback and suggestions to configure automated tools, and crowdsourcing to gather inputs from citizens. The results are validated by discussing three case studies developed within the Crowd4SDG H2020 European project.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体有潜力提供有关紧急情况和突发事件的及时信息。然而，在每天发布的数百万条帖子中找到相关信息可能很困难，并且开发数据分析项目通常需要时间和技术技能。这项研究提出了一种为分析社交媒体（特别是在紧急情况下）提供灵活支持的方法。介绍了可以采用社交媒体分析的不同用例，并讨论了从大量帖子中检索信息的挑战。重点是分析社交媒体帖子中包含的图像和文本，以及一套自动数据处理工具，用于通过人机交互方法对内容进行过滤、分类和地理定位，以支持数据分析师。此类支持包括配置自动化工具的反馈和建议，以及收集公民意见的众包。通过讨论 Crowd4SDG H2020 欧洲项目中开发的三个案例研究来验证结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合众包与自动化工具的社交媒体分析方法，用于提升应急事件中的信息处理效率。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体信息量庞大且实时性强，但传统分析方法存在技术门槛高、处理效率低的问题，亟需灵活工具支持应急响应。
AI.method: 开发自动数据处理工具实现内容过滤、分类与地理定位，并通过人机协作机制与众包模式整合公民输入以优化分析结果。
AI.result: 通过Crowd4SDG项目的三个案例验证，该方法有效提升了社交媒体信息的处理效率与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 众包与自动化结合的框架可显著增强应急场景下的社交媒体分析能力，为未来灾害响应提供了可扩展的技术方案。

authors_text: Yuliya Lierler,Jose F. Morales,Carmine Dodaro,Veronica Dahl,Martin Gebser,Tuncay Tekle
title: Proceedings 38th International Conference on Logic Programming
title_zh: 第 38 届国际逻辑编程会议论文集
abstract: ICLP is the premier international event for presenting research in logic programming. Contributions to ICLP 2022 were sought in all areas of logic programming, including but not limited to: Foundations: Semantics, Formalisms, Nonmonotonic reasoning, Knowledge representation. Languages issues: Concurrency, Objects, Coordination, Mobility, Higher order, Types, Modes, Assertions, Modules, Meta-programming, Logic-based domain-specific languages, Programming techniques. Programming support: Program analysis, Transformation, Validation, Verification, Debugging, Profiling, Testing, Execution visualization. Implementation: Compilation, Virtual machines, Memory management, Parallel and Distributed execution, Constraint handling rules, Tabling, Foreign interfaces, User interfaces. Related Paradigms and Synergies: Inductive and coinductive logic programming, Constraint logic programming, Answer set programming, Interaction with SAT, SMT and CSP solvers, Theorem proving, Argumentation, Probabilistic programming, Machine learning. Applications: Databases, Big data, Data integration and federation, Software engineering, Natural language processing, Web and semantic web, Agents, Artificial intelligence, Computational life sciences, Cyber-security, Robotics, Education.
summary: ICLP is the premier international event for presenting research in logic programming. Contributions to ICLP 2022 were sought in all areas of logic programming, including but not limited to: Foundations: Semantics, Formalisms, Nonmonotonic reasoning, Knowledge representation. Languages issues: Concurrency, Objects, Coordination, Mobility, Higher order, Types, Modes, Assertions, Modules, Meta-programming, Logic-based domain-specific languages, Programming techniques. Programming support: Program analysis, Transformation, Validation, Verification, Debugging, Profiling, Testing, Execution visualization. Applications: Databases, Big data, Data integration and federation, Software engineering, Natural language processing, Web and semantic web, Agents, Artificial intelligence, Computational life sciences, Cyber-security, Robotics, Education.
abstract_zh: ICLP 是展示逻辑编程研究的首要国际活动。 ICLP 2022 寻求逻辑编程所有领域的贡献，包括但不限于：基础：语义、形式主义、非单调推理、知识表示。语言问题：并发、对象、协调、移动性、高阶、类型、模式、断言、模块、元编程、基于逻辑的特定领域语言、编程技术。编程支持：程序分析、转换、验证、核实、调试、分析、测试、执行可视化。实现：编译、虚拟机、内存管理、并行和分布式执行、约束处理规则、表格、外部接口、用户界面。相关范式和协同作用：归纳和归纳逻辑编程、约束逻辑编程、答案集编程、与 SAT、SMT 和 CSP 求解器的交互、定理证明、论证、概率编程、机器学习。应用：数据库、大数据、数据集成和联合、软件工程、自然语言处理、网络和语义网、代理、人工智能、计算生命科学、网络安全、机器人、教育。

AI.tldr: 该论文集总结了第38届国际逻辑编程会议（ICLP）的研究范围，涵盖逻辑编程的理论、语言设计、实现技术及应用等多个方向。
AI.motivation: 推动逻辑编程领域的发展，促进不同子领域（如知识表示、约束编程、机器学习等）的学术交流与技术融合。
AI.method: 通过征集和整理逻辑编程相关领域的研究成果，包括理论基础、编程语言设计、实现技术及实际应用案例，形成综合性论文集。
AI.result: 系统性呈现了逻辑编程的最新研究进展，覆盖从基础理论到实际应用的广泛议题，为学术界和工业界提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 会议巩固了逻辑编程作为跨学科研究平台的地位，并为未来技术发展（如人工智能、大数据等）提供了理论支持和实践方向。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文集总结了第38届国际逻辑编程会议（ICLP）的研究范围，涵盖逻辑编程的理论、语言设计、实现技术及应用等多个方向。
ai_content.motivation: 推动逻辑编程领域的发展，促进不同子领域（如知识表示、约束编程、机器学习等）的学术交流与技术融合。
ai_content.method: 通过征集和整理逻辑编程相关领域的研究成果，包括理论基础、编程语言设计、实现技术及实际应用案例，形成综合性论文集。
ai_content.result: 系统性呈现了逻辑编程的最新研究进展，覆盖从基础理论到实际应用的广泛议题，为学术界和工业界提供参考。
ai_content.conclusion: 会议巩固了逻辑编程作为跨学科研究平台的地位，并为未来技术发展（如人工智能、大数据等）提供了理论支持和实践方向。

search_text: Proceedings 38th International Conference on Logic Programming 第 38 届国际逻辑编程会议论文集 ICLP is the premier international event for presenting research in logic programming. Contributions to ICLP 2022 were sought in all areas of logic programming, including but not limited to: Foundations: Semantics, Formalisms, Nonmonotonic reasoning, Knowledge representation. Languages issues: Concurrency, Objects, Coordination, Mobility, Higher order, Types, Modes, Assertions, Modules, Meta-programming, Logic-based domain-specific languages, Programming techniques. Programming support: Program analysis, Transformation, Validation, Verification, Debugging, Profiling, Testing, Execution visualization. Implementation: Compilation, Virtual machines, Memory management, Parallel and Distributed execution, Constraint handling rules, Tabling, Foreign interfaces, User interfaces. Related Paradigms and Synergies: Inductive and coinductive logic programming, Constraint logic programming, Answer set programming, Interaction with SAT, SMT and CSP solvers, Theorem proving, Argumentation, Probabilistic programming, Machine learning. Applications: Databases, Big data, Data integration and federation, Software engineering, Natural language processing, Web and semantic web, Agents, Artificial intelligence, Computational life sciences, Cyber-security, Robotics, Education. ICLP 是展示逻辑编程研究的首要国际活动。 ICLP 2022 寻求逻辑编程所有领域的贡献，包括但不限于：基础：语义、形式主义、非单调推理、知识表示。语言问题：并发、对象、协调、移动性、高阶、类型、模式、断言、模块、元编程、基于逻辑的特定领域语言、编程技术。编程支持：程序分析、转换、验证、核实、调试、分析、测试、执行可视化。实现：编译、虚拟机、内存管理、并行和分布式执行、约束处理规则、表格、外部接口、用户界面。相关范式和协同作用：归纳和归纳逻辑编程、约束逻辑编程、答案集编程、与 SAT、SMT 和 CSP 求解器的交互、定理证明、论证、概率编程、机器学习。应用：数据库、大数据、数据集成和联合、软件工程、自然语言处理、网络和语义网、代理、人工智能、计算生命科学、网络安全、机器人、教育。 该论文集总结了第38届国际逻辑编程会议（ICLP）的研究范围，涵盖逻辑编程的理论、语言设计、实现技术及应用等多个方向。 Yuliya Lierler,Jose F. Morales,Carmine Dodaro,Veronica Dahl,Martin Gebser,Tuncay Tekle cs.LO,cs.AI

authors_text: Xufeng Zhao,Cornelius Weber,Muhammad Burhan Hafez,Stefan Wermter
title: Impact Makes a Sound and Sound Makes an Impact: Sound Guides Representations and Explorations
title_zh: 影响产生声音，声音产生影响：声音引导表征和探索
abstract: Sound is one of the most informative and abundant modalities in the real world while being robust to sense without contacts by small and cheap sensors that can be placed on mobile devices. Although deep learning is capable of extracting information from multiple sensory inputs, there has been little use of sound for the control and learning of robotic actions. For unsupervised reinforcement learning, an agent is expected to actively collect experiences and jointly learn representations and policies in a self-supervised way. We build realistic robotic manipulation scenarios with physics-based sound simulation and propose the Intrinsic Sound Curiosity Module (ISCM). The ISCM provides feedback to a reinforcement learner to learn robust representations and to reward a more efficient exploration behavior. We perform experiments with sound enabled during pre-training and disabled during adaptation, and show that representations learned by ISCM outperform the ones by vision-only baselines and pre-trained policies can accelerate the learning process when applied to downstream tasks.
summary: Sound is one of the most informative and abundant modalities in the real world while being robust to sense without contacts by small and cheap sensors that can be placed on mobile devices. Although deep learning is capable of extracting information from multiple sensory inputs, there has been little use of sound for the control and learning of robotic actions. For unsupervised reinforcement learning, an agent is expected to actively collect experiences and jointly learn representations and policies in a self-supervised way. We build realistic robotic manipulation scenarios with physics-based sound simulation and propose the Intrinsic Sound Curiosity Module (ISCM). The ISCM provides feedback to a reinforcement learner to learn robust representations and to reward a more efficient exploration behavior. We perform experiments with sound enabled during pre-training and disabled during adaptation, and show that representations learned by ISCM outperform the ones by vision-only baselines and pre-trained policies can accelerate the learning process when applied to downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 声音是现实世界中信息量最大、最丰富的形式之一，同时通过可放置在移动设备上的小型且廉价的传感器无需接触即可感知。尽管深度学习能够从多种感官输入中提取信息，但很少使用声音来控制和学习机器人动作。对于无监督强化学习，智能体需要积极收集经验，并以自我监督的方式共同学习表示和策略。我们通过基于物理的声音模拟构建真实的机器人操作场景，并提出内在声音好奇模块（ISCM）。 ISCM 向强化学习器提供反馈，以学习稳健的表示并奖励更有效的探索行为。我们在预训练期间启用声音并在适应期间禁用声音进行了实验，结果表明，ISCM 学习的表示优于仅视觉基线的表示，并且预训练策略在应用于下游任务时可以加速学习过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用声音信息指导机器人学习中的表示生成与探索，通过设计内在声音好奇心模块（ISCM）提升强化学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管声音是现实世界中丰富且易获取的感知模态，但现有研究在机器人控制与学习中极少利用声音信息，导致探索效率与表示学习存在局限。
AI.method: 构建基于物理模拟的机器人操作场景，提出ISCM模块通过声音反馈引导强化学习智能体，在预训练阶段启用声音、适应阶段禁用声音，实现跨阶段的表示迁移。
AI.result: ISCM在预训练阶段的表示性能优于纯视觉基线，且预训练策略可加速下游任务的学习过程，验证了声音引导的表示有效性。
AI.conclusion: 声音可作为关键感知模态提升机器人学习的表示质量与探索效率，ISCM框架为多模态强化学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xianghui Yang,Guosheng Lin,Luping Zhou
title: Single-view 3D Mesh Reconstruction for Seen and Unseen Categories
title_zh: 针对已见和未见类别的单视图 3D 网格重建
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP)
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP)
abstract: Single-view 3D object reconstruction is a fundamental and challenging computer vision task that aims at recovering 3D shapes from single-view RGB images. Most existing deep learning based reconstruction methods are trained and evaluated on the same categories, and they cannot work well when handling objects from novel categories that are not seen during training. Focusing on this issue, this paper tackles Single-view 3D Mesh Reconstruction, to study the model generalization on unseen categories and encourage models to reconstruct objects literally. Specifically, we propose an end-to-end two-stage network, GenMesh, to break the category boundaries in reconstruction. Firstly, we factorize the complicated image-to-mesh mapping into two simpler mappings, i.e., image-to-point mapping and point-to-mesh mapping, while the latter is mainly a geometric problem and less dependent on object categories. Secondly, we devise a local feature sampling strategy in 2D and 3D feature spaces to capture the local geometry shared across objects to enhance model generalization. Thirdly, apart from the traditional point-to-point supervision, we introduce a multi-view silhouette loss to supervise the surface generation process, which provides additional regularization and further relieves the overfitting problem. The experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms the existing works on the ShapeNet and Pix3D under different scenarios and various metrics, especially for novel objects. The project link is https://github.com/Wi-sc/GenMesh.
summary: Single-view 3D object reconstruction is a fundamental and challenging computer vision task that aims at recovering 3D shapes from single-view RGB images. Most existing deep learning based reconstruction methods are trained and evaluated on the same categories, and they cannot work well when handling objects from novel categories that are not seen during training. Focusing on this issue, this paper tackles Single-view 3D Mesh Reconstruction, to study the model generalization on unseen categories and encourage models to reconstruct objects literally. Specifically, we propose an end-to-end two-stage network, GenMesh, to break the category boundaries in reconstruction. Firstly, we factorize the complicated image-to-mesh mapping into two simpler mappings, i.e., image-to-point mapping and point-to-mesh mapping, while the latter is mainly a geometric problem and less dependent on object categories. Secondly, we devise a local feature sampling strategy in 2D and 3D feature spaces to capture the local geometry shared across objects to enhance model generalization. Thirdly, apart from the traditional point-to-point supervision, we introduce a multi-view silhouette loss to supervise the surface generation process, which provides additional regularization and further relieves the overfitting problem. The experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms the existing works on the ShapeNet and Pix3D under different scenarios and various metrics, especially for novel objects. The project link is https://github.com/Wi-sc/GenMesh.
abstract_zh: 单视图 3D 对象重建是一项基本且具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务，旨在从单视图 RGB 图像中恢复 3D 形状。大多数现有的基于深度学习的重建方法都是​​在相同的类别上进行训练和评估的，并且在处理训练期间未见过的新类别的对象时，它们不能很好地工作。针对这个问题，本文解决了单视图 3D 网格重建问题，研究对不可见类别的模型泛化，并鼓励模型从字面上重建对象。具体来说，我们提出了一种端到端的两阶段网络 GenMesh，以打破重建中的类别边界。首先，我们将复杂的图像到网格映射分解为两个更简单的映射，即图像到点映射和点到网格映射，而后者主要是一个几何问题，较少依赖于对象类别。其次，我们在 2D 和 3D 特征空间中设计了一种局部特征采样策略，以捕获跨对象共享的局部几何形状，以增强模型泛化能力。第三，除了传统的点对点监督之外，我们引入了多视图轮廓损失来监督表面生成过程，这提供了额外的正则化并进一步缓解了过度拟合问题。实验结果表明，我们的方法在不同场景和各种指标下明显优于 ShapeNet 和 Pix3D 上的现有工作，特别是对于新物体。项目链接为https://github.com/Wi-sc/GenMesh。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单视角3D网格重建方法GenMesh，旨在解决对训练时未见过的物体类别的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习重建方法在处理训练阶段未见过的新类别物体时表现不佳，需提升模型对未知类别的泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计两阶段网络GenMesh，将图像到网格映射分解为图像到点和点到网格映射，结合局部特征采样策略及多视角轮廓损失函数。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet和Pix3D数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在新型物体重建任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何特征解耦与多视角监督，GenMesh有效突破了类别边界限制，提升了对未知类别的重建能力。
