result: 在ShapeNet和Pix3D数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在新型物体重建任务中表现突出。
conclusion: 通过几何特征解耦与多视角监督，GenMesh有效突破了类别边界限制，提升了对未知类别的重建能力。
search_text: Single-view 3D Mesh Reconstruction for Seen and Unseen Categories 针对已见和未见类别的单视图 3D 网格重建 Single-view 3D object reconstruction is a fundamental and challenging computer vision task that aims at recovering 3D shapes from single-view RGB images. Most existing deep learning based reconstruction methods are trained and evaluated on the same categories, and they cannot work well when handling objects from novel categories that are not seen during training. Focusing on this issue, this paper tackles Single-view 3D Mesh Reconstruction, to study the model generalization on unseen categories and encourage models to reconstruct objects literally. Specifically, we propose an end-to-end two-stage network, GenMesh, to break the category boundaries in reconstruction. Firstly, we factorize the complicated image-to-mesh mapping into two simpler mappings, i.e., image-to-point mapping and point-to-mesh mapping, while the latter is mainly a geometric problem and less dependent on object categories. Secondly, we devise a local feature sampling strategy in 2D and 3D feature spaces to capture the local geometry shared across objects to enhance model generalization. Thirdly, apart from the traditional point-to-point supervision, we introduce a multi-view silhouette loss to supervise the surface generation process, which provides additional regularization and further relieves the overfitting problem. The experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms the existing works on the ShapeNet and Pix3D under different scenarios and various metrics, especially for novel objects. The project link is https://github.com/Wi-sc/GenMesh. 单视图 3D 对象重建是一项基本且具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务，旨在从单视图 RGB 图像中恢复 3D 形状。大多数现有的基于深度学习的重建方法都是​​在相同的类别上进行训练和评估的，并且在处理训练期间未见过的新类别的对象时，它们不能很好地工作。针对这个问题，本文解决了单视图 3D 网格重建问题，研究对不可见类别的模型泛化，并鼓励模型从字面上重建对象。具体来说，我们提出了一种端到端的两阶段网络 GenMesh，以打破重建中的类别边界。首先，我们将复杂的图像到网格映射分解为两个更简单的映射，即图像到点映射和点到网格映射，而后者主要是一个几何问题，较少依赖于对象类别。其次，我们在 2D 和 3D 特征空间中设计了一种局部特征采样策略，以捕获跨对象共享的局部几何形状，以增强模型泛化能力。第三，除了传统的点对点监督之外，我们引入了多视图轮廓损失来监督表面生成过程，这提供了额外的正则化并进一步缓解了过度拟合问题。实验结果表明，我们的方法在不同场景和各种指标下明显优于 ShapeNet 和 Pix3D 上的现有工作，特别是对于新物体。项目链接为https://github.com/Wi-sc/GenMesh。 本文提出一种单视角3D网格重建方法GenMesh，旨在解决对训练时未见过的物体类别的泛化问题。 Xianghui Yang,Guosheng Lin,Luping Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Anjali Sonkariya,Awadh Pratap Singh,Shiv Prasad Yadav
title: Development of fully intuitionistic fuzzy data envelopment analysis model with missing data: an application to Indian police sector
title_zh: 开发完全直观的缺失数据模糊数据包络分析模型：在印度警察部门的应用
abstract: Data Envelopment Analysis (DEA) is a technique used to measure the efficiency of decision-making units (DMUs). In order to measure the efficiency of DMUs, the essential requirement is input-output data. Data is usually collected by humans, machines, or both. Due to human/machine errors, there are chances of having some missing values or inaccuracy, such as vagueness/uncertainty/hesitation in the collected data. In this situation, it will be difficult to measure the efficiencies of DMUs accurately. To overcome these shortcomings, a method is presented that can deal with missing values and inaccuracy in the data. To measure the performance efficiencies of DMUs, an input minimization BCC (IMBCC) model in a fully intuitionistic fuzzy (IF) environment is proposed. To validate the efficacy of the proposed fully intuitionistic fuzzy input minimization BCC (FIFIMBCC) model and the technique to deal with missing values in the data, a real-life application to measure the performance efficiencies of Indian police stations is presented.
summary: Data Envelopment Analysis (DEA) is a technique used to measure the efficiency of decision-making units (DMUs). In order to measure the efficiency of DMUs, the essential requirement is input-output data. Data is usually collected by humans, machines, or both. Due to human/machine errors, there are chances of having some missing values or inaccuracy, such as vagueness/uncertainty/hesitation in the collected data. In this situation, it will be difficult to measure the efficiencies of DMUs accurately. To overcome these shortcomings, a method is presented that can deal with missing values and inaccuracy in the data. To measure the performance efficiencies of DMUs, an input minimization BCC (IMBCC) model in a fully intuitionistic fuzzy (IF) environment is proposed. To validate the efficacy of the proposed fully intuitionistic fuzzy input minimization BCC (FIFIMBCC) model and the technique to deal with missing values in the data, a real-life application to measure the performance efficiencies of Indian police stations is presented.
abstract_zh: 数据包络分析 (DEA) 是一种用于衡量决策单元 (DMU) 效率的技术。为了衡量DMU的效率，基本要求是输入输出数据。数据通常由人类、机器或两者收集。由于人为/机器错误，可能会出现一些缺失值或不准确的情况，例如收集的数据模糊/不确定/犹豫。在这种情况下，很难准确衡量 DMU 的效率。为了克服这些缺点，提出了一种可以处理数据缺失值和不准确的方法。为了测量 DMU 的性能效率，提出了一种完全直觉模糊 (IF) 环境中的输入最小化 BCC (IMBCC) 模型。为了验证所提出的完全直观的模糊输入最小化 BCC (FIFIMBCC) 模型和处理数据缺失值的技术的有效性，提出了一个衡量印度警察局绩效效率的现实应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在完全直觉模糊环境下处理缺失数据的DEA模型，并将其应用于印度警察部门的绩效评估。
AI.motivation: 传统DEA模型要求完整的输入输出数据，但实际数据常因人为或机器误差导致缺失或模糊，影响效率评估准确性。
AI.method: 提出基于直觉模糊集的输入最小化BCC模型（FIFIMBCC），结合缺失数据处理技术，通过印度警察局的实际案例验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 模型成功处理了印度警察部门数据中的缺失值和不确定性，准确评估了各警察局的绩效效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为存在缺失数据和模糊信息的效率评估提供了有效工具，适用于公共部门等复杂场景。

authors_text: T. Dam,G. Chalvatzaki,J. Peters,J. Pajarinen
title: Monte-Carlo Robot Path Planning
title_zh: 蒙特卡罗机器人路径规划
abstract: Path planning is a crucial algorithmic approach for designing robot behaviors. Sampling-based approaches, like rapidly exploring random trees (RRTs) or probabilistic roadmaps, are prominent algorithmic solutions for path planning problems. Despite its exponential convergence rate, RRT can only find suboptimal paths. On the other hand, $\textrm{RRT}^*$, a widely-used extension to RRT, guarantees probabilistic completeness for finding optimal paths but suffers in practice from slow convergence in complex environments. Furthermore, real-world robotic environments are often partially observable or with poorly described dynamics, casting the application of $\textrm{RRT}^*$ in complex tasks suboptimal. This paper studies a novel algorithmic formulation of the popular Monte-Carlo tree search (MCTS) algorithm for robot path planning. Notably, we study Monte-Carlo Path Planning (MCPP) by analyzing and proving, on the one part, its exponential convergence rate to the optimal path in fully observable Markov decision processes (MDPs), and on the other part, its probabilistic completeness for finding feasible paths in partially observable MDPs (POMDPs) assuming limited distance observability (proof sketch). Our algorithmic contribution allows us to employ recently proposed variants of MCTS with different exploration strategies for robot path planning. Our experimental evaluations in simulated 2D and 3D environments with a 7 degrees of freedom (DOF) manipulator, as well as in a real-world robot path planning task, demonstrate the superiority of MCPP in POMDP tasks.
summary: Path planning is a crucial algorithmic approach for designing robot behaviors. Sampling-based approaches, like rapidly exploring random trees (RRTs) or probabilistic roadmaps, are prominent algorithmic solutions for path planning problems. Despite its exponential convergence rate, RRT can only find suboptimal paths. On the other hand, $\textrm{RRT}^*$, a widely-used extension to RRT, guarantees probabilistic completeness for finding optimal paths but suffers in practice from slow convergence in complex environments. Furthermore, real-world robotic environments are often partially observable or with poorly described dynamics, casting the application of $\textrm{RRT}^*$ in complex tasks suboptimal. This paper studies a novel algorithmic formulation of the popular Monte-Carlo tree search (MCTS) algorithm for robot path planning. Notably, we study Monte-Carlo Path Planning (MCPP) by analyzing and proving, on the one part, its exponential convergence rate to the optimal path in fully observable Markov decision processes (MDPs), and on the other part, its probabilistic completeness for finding feasible paths in partially observable MDPs (POMDPs) assuming limited distance observability (proof sketch). Our algorithmic contribution allows us to employ recently proposed variants of MCTS with different exploration strategies for robot path planning. Our experimental evaluations in simulated 2D and 3D environments with a 7 degrees of freedom (DOF) manipulator, as well as in a real-world robot path planning task, demonstrate the superiority of MCPP in POMDP tasks.
abstract_zh: 路径规划是设计机器人行为的重要算法方法。基于采样的方法，例如快速探索随机树 (RRT) 或概率路线图，是路径规划问题的重要算法解决方案。尽管 RRT 具有指数收敛速度，但它只能找到次优路径。另一方面，$\textrm{RRT}^*$ 是一种广泛使用的 RRT 扩展，保证了寻找最优路径的概率完整性，但在实践中却在复杂环境中收敛缓慢。此外，现实世界的机器人环境通常是部分可观察的或动态描述不佳，导致 $\textrm{RRT}^*$ 在复杂任务中的应用不是最佳的。本文研究了用于机器人路径规划的流行蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）算法的新颖算法公式。值得注意的是，我们研究蒙特卡罗路径规划（MCPP），一方面分析和证明其在完全可观测马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中最优路径的指数收敛速度，另一方面在假设有限距离可观测性的情况下，在部分可观测 MDP（POMDP）中寻找可行路径的概率完整性（证明草图）。我们的算法贡献使我们能够采用最近提出的 MCTS 变体以及不同的探索策略来进行机器人路径规划。我们在使用 7 自由度 (DOF) 机械臂的模拟 2D 和 3D 环境以及现实世界的机器人路径规划任务中进行的实验评估证明了 MCPP 在 POMDP 任务中的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的新型机器人路径规划算法——蒙特卡洛路径规划（MCPP），以解决传统方法在复杂环境中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划算法如RRT和RRT*在复杂或部分可观测环境中存在收敛速度慢、路径次优等问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析和证明MCPP在完全可观测MDP中的指数收敛性及在部分可观测POMDP中的概率完备性，结合不同探索策略的MCTS变体实现路径规划。
AI.result: 在2D/3D仿真环境及7自由度机械臂和真实机器人任务中，MCPP在POMDP任务中表现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: MCPP为复杂动态环境下的机器人路径规划提供了理论保障和高效算法，适用于部分可观测场景的最优路径搜索。

Notably, we study Monte-Carlo Path Planning (MCPP) by analyzing and proving, on the one part, its exponential convergence rate to the optimal path in fully observable Markov decision processes (MDPs), and on the other part, its probabilistic completeness for finding feasible paths in partially observable MDPs (POMDPs) assuming limited distance observability (proof sketch). Our algorithmic contribution allows us to employ recently proposed variants of MCTS with different exploration strategies for robot path planning. Our experimental evaluations in simulated 2D and 3D environments with a 7 degrees of freedom (DOF) manipulator, as well as in a real-world robot path planning task, demonstrate the superiority of MCPP in POMDP tasks. 路径规划是设计机器人行为的重要算法方法。基于采样的方法，例如快速探索随机树 (RRT) 或概率路线图，是路径规划问题的重要算法解决方案。尽管 RRT 具有指数收敛速度，但它只能找到次优路径。另一方面，$\textrm{RRT}^*$ 是一种广泛使用的 RRT 扩展，保证了寻找最优路径的概率完整性，但在实践中却在复杂环境中收敛缓慢。此外，现实世界的机器人环境通常是部分可观察的或动态描述不佳，导致 $\textrm{RRT}^*$ 在复杂任务中的应用不是最佳的。本文研究了用于机器人路径规划的流行蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）算法的新颖算法公式。值得注意的是，我们研究蒙特卡罗路径规划（MCPP），一方面分析和证明其在完全可观测马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中最优路径的指数收敛速度，另一方面在假设有限距离可观测性的情况下，在部分可观测 MDP（POMDP）中寻找可行路径的概率完整性（证明草图）。我们的算法贡献使我们能够采用最近提出的 MCTS 变体以及不同的探索策略来进行机器人路径规划。我们在使用 7 自由度 (DOF) 机械臂的模拟 2D 和 3D 环境以及现实世界的机器人路径规划任务中进行的实验评估证明了 MCPP 在 POMDP 任务中的优越性。 本文提出了一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的新型机器人路径规划算法——蒙特卡洛路径规划（MCPP），以解决传统方法在复杂环境中的不足。 T. Dam,G. Chalvatzaki,J. Peters,J. Pajarinen cs.RO

authors_text: Ming Cheng,Yiling Xu,Wang Shen,M. Salman Asif,Chao Ma,Jun Sun,Zhan Ma
title: H2-Stereo: High-Speed, High-Resolution Stereoscopic Video System
title_zh: H2-Stereo：高速、高分辨率立体视频系统
abstract: High-speed, high-resolution stereoscopic (H2-Stereo) video allows us to perceive dynamic 3D content at fine granularity. The acquisition of H2-Stereo video, however, remains challenging with commodity cameras. Existing spatial super-resolution or temporal frame interpolation methods provide compromised solutions that lack temporal or spatial details, respectively. To alleviate this problem, we propose a dual camera system, in which one camera captures high-spatial-resolution low-frame-rate (HSR-LFR) videos with rich spatial details, and the other captures low-spatial-resolution high-frame-rate (LSR-HFR) videos with smooth temporal details. We then devise a Learned Information Fusion network (LIFnet) that exploits the cross-camera redundancies to enhance both camera views to high spatiotemporal resolution (HSTR) for reconstructing the H2-Stereo video effectively. We utilize a disparity network to transfer spatiotemporal information across views even in large disparity scenes, based on which, we propose disparity-guided flow-based warping for LSR-HFR view and complementary warping for HSR-LFR view. A multi-scale fusion method in feature domain is proposed to minimize occlusion-induced warping ghosts and holes in HSR-LFR view. The LIFnet is trained in an end-to-end manner using our collected high-quality Stereo Video dataset from YouTube. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods for both views on synthetic data and camera-captured real data with large disparity. Ablation studies explore various aspects, including spatiotemporal resolution, camera baseline, camera desynchronization, long/short exposures and applications, of our system to fully understand its capability for potential applications.
summary: High-speed, high-resolution stereoscopic (H2-Stereo) video allows us to perceive dynamic 3D content at fine granularity. The acquisition of H2-Stereo video, however, remains challenging with commodity cameras. Existing spatial super-resolution or temporal frame interpolation methods provide compromised solutions that lack temporal or spatial details, respectively. To alleviate this problem, we propose a dual camera system, in which one camera captures high-spatial-resolution low-frame-rate (HSR-LFR) videos with rich spatial details, and the other captures low-spatial-resolution high-frame-rate (LSR-HFR) videos with smooth temporal details. We then devise a Learned Information Fusion network (LIFnet) that exploits the cross-camera redundancies to enhance both camera views to high spatiotemporal resolution (HSTR) for reconstructing the H2-Stereo video effectively. We utilize a disparity network to transfer spatiotemporal information across views even in large disparity scenes, based on which, we propose disparity-guided flow-based warping for LSR-HFR view and complementary warping for HSR-LFR view. A multi-scale fusion method in feature domain is proposed to minimize occlusion-induced warping ghosts and holes in HSR-LFR view. The LIFnet is trained in an end-to-end manner using our collected high-quality Stereo Video dataset from YouTube. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods for both views on synthetic data and camera-captured real data with large disparity. Ablation studies explore various aspects, including spatiotemporal resolution, camera baseline, camera desynchronization, long/short exposures and applications, of our system to fully understand its capability for potential applications.
abstract_zh: 高速、高分辨率立体 (H2-Stereo) 视频使我们能够以细粒度感知动态 3D 内容。然而，对于商用相机来说，获取 H2 立体视频仍然具有挑战性。现有的空间超分辨率或时间帧插值方法提供了分别缺乏时间或空间细节的折衷解决方案。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种双摄像头系统，其中一个摄像头捕获具有丰富空间细节的高空间分辨率低帧率（HSR-LFR）视频，另一个摄像头捕获具有平滑时间细节的低空间分辨率高帧率（LSR-HFR）视频。然后，我们设计了一个学习信息融合网络 (LIFnet)，利用跨摄像机冗余将两个摄像机视图增强到高时空分辨率 (HSTR)，从而有效地重建 H2 立体视频。即使在大视差场景中，我们也利用视差网络在视图之间传输时空信息，基于此，我们提出了针对LSR-HFR视图的视差引导的基于流的扭曲和针对HSR-LFR视图的互补扭曲。提出了一种特征域中的多尺度融合方法，以最大限度地减少 HSR-LFR 视图中遮挡引起的扭曲鬼影和孔洞。 LIFnet 使用我们从 YouTube 收集的高质量立体视频数据集以端到端的方式进行训练。大量的实验表明，我们的模型在合成数据和相机捕获的具有较大差异的真实数据的视图方面都优于现有的最先进的方法。消融研究探索了我们系统的各个方面，包括时空分辨率、相机基线、相机去同步、长/短曝光和应用，以充分了解其潜在应用的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出H2-Stereo系统，通过双摄像头与深度学习网络实现高速高分辨率立体视频采集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在时空细节上存在妥协，无法同时满足高空间分辨率与高帧率需求，导致动态3D内容感知受限。
AI.method: 采用双摄像头系统（HSR-LFR与LSR-HFR）配合LIFnet网络，通过视差引导的流场对齐与多尺度特征融合，实现时空分辨率增强。
AI.result: 在合成数据与真实场景中均优于现有方法，尤其在大视差场景下有效消除失真，完成多因素消融实验验证系统鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过时空信息互补与深度学习融合，为高精度立体视频采集提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Existing spatial super-resolution or temporal frame interpolation methods provide compromised solutions that lack temporal or spatial details, respectively. To alleviate this problem, we propose a dual camera system, in which one camera captures high-spatial-resolution low-frame-rate (HSR-LFR) videos with rich spatial details, and the other captures low-spatial-resolution high-frame-rate (LSR-HFR) videos with smooth temporal details. We then devise a Learned Information Fusion network (LIFnet) that exploits the cross-camera redundancies to enhance both camera views to high spatiotemporal resolution (HSTR) for reconstructing the H2-Stereo video effectively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods for both views on synthetic data and camera-captured real data with large disparity. Ablation studies explore various aspects, including spatiotemporal resolution, camera baseline, camera desynchronization, long/short exposures and applications, of our system to fully understand its capability for potential applications. 高速、高分辨率立体 (H2-Stereo) 视频使我们能够以细粒度感知动态 3D 内容。然而，对于商用相机来说，获取 H2 立体视频仍然具有挑战性。现有的空间超分辨率或时间帧插值方法提供了分别缺乏时间或空间细节的折衷解决方案。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种双摄像头系统，其中一个摄像头捕获具有丰富空间细节的高空间分辨率低帧率（HSR-LFR）视频，另一个摄像头捕获具有平滑时间细节的低空间分辨率高帧率（LSR-HFR）视频。然后，我们设计了一个学习信息融合网络 (LIFnet)，利用跨摄像机冗余将两个摄像机视图增强到高时空分辨率 (HSTR)，从而有效地重建 H2 立体视频。即使在大视差场景中，我们也利用视差网络在视图之间传输时空信息，基于此，我们提出了针对LSR-HFR视图的视差引导的基于流的扭曲和针对HSR-LFR视图的互补扭曲。提出了一种特征域中的多尺度融合方法，以最大限度地减少 HSR-LFR 视图中遮挡引起的扭曲鬼影和孔洞。 LIFnet 使用我们从 YouTube 收集的高质量立体视频数据集以端到端的方式进行训练。大量的实验表明，我们的模型在合成数据和相机捕获的具有较大差异的真实数据的视图方面都优于现有的最先进的方法。消融研究探索了我们系统的各个方面，包括时空分辨率、相机基线、相机去同步、长/短曝光和应用，以充分了解其潜在应用的能力。 本文提出H2-Stereo系统，通过双摄像头与深度学习网络实现高速高分辨率立体视频采集。 Ming Cheng,Yiling Xu,Wang Shen,M. authors_text: Yuxin Pan,Fangzhen Lin
title: Backward Imitation and Forward Reinforcement Learning via Bi-directional Model Rollouts
title_zh: 通过双向模型推出进行后向模仿和前向强化学习
abstract: Traditional model-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods generate forward rollout traces using the learnt dynamics model to reduce interactions with the real environment. The recent model-based RL method considers the way to learn a backward model that specifies the conditional probability of the previous state given the previous action and the current state to additionally generate backward rollout trajectories. However, in this type of model-based method, the samples derived from backward rollouts and those from forward rollouts are simply aggregated together to optimize the policy via the model-free RL algorithm, which may decrease both the sample efficiency and the convergence rate. This is because such an approach ignores the fact that backward rollout traces are often generated starting from some high-value states and are certainly more instructive for the agent to improve the behavior. In this paper, we propose the backward imitation and forward reinforcement learning (BIFRL) framework where the agent treats backward rollout traces as expert demonstrations for the imitation of excellent behaviors, and then collects forward rollout transitions for policy reinforcement. Consequently, BIFRL empowers the agent to both reach to and explore from high-value states in a more efficient manner, and further reduces the real interactions, making it potentially more suitable for real-robot learning. Moreover, a value-regularized generative adversarial network is introduced to augment the valuable states which are infrequently received by the agent. Theoretically, we provide the condition where BIFRL is superior to the baseline methods. Experimentally, we demonstrate that BIFRL acquires the better sample efficiency and produces the competitive asymptotic performance on various MuJoCo locomotion tasks compared against state-of-the-art model-based methods.
summary: Traditional model-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods generate forward rollout traces using the learnt dynamics model to reduce interactions with the real environment. The recent model-based RL method considers the way to learn a backward model that specifies the conditional probability of the previous state given the previous action and the current state to additionally generate backward rollout trajectories. However, in this type of model-based method, the samples derived from backward rollouts and those from forward rollouts are simply aggregated together to optimize the policy via the model-free RL algorithm, which may decrease both the sample efficiency and the convergence rate. This is because such an approach ignores the fact that backward rollout traces are often generated starting from some high-value states and are certainly more instructive for the agent to improve the behavior. In this paper, we propose the backward imitation and forward reinforcement learning (BIFRL) framework where the agent treats backward rollout traces as expert demonstrations for the imitation of excellent behaviors, and then collects forward rollout transitions for policy reinforcement. Consequently, BIFRL empowers the agent to both reach to and explore from high-value states in a more efficient manner, and further reduces the real interactions, making it potentially more suitable for real-robot learning. Moreover, a value-regularized generative adversarial network is introduced to augment the valuable states which are infrequently received by the agent. Theoretically, we provide the condition where BIFRL is superior to the baseline methods. Experimentally, we demonstrate that BIFRL acquires the better sample efficiency and produces the competitive asymptotic performance on various MuJoCo locomotion tasks compared against state-of-the-art model-based methods.
abstract_zh: 传统的基于模型的强化学习 (RL) 方法使用学习到的动态模型生成前向推出轨迹，以减少与真实环境的交互。最近基于模型的强化学习方法考虑了学习向后模型的方法，该模型指定给定先前动作和当前状态的先前状态的条件概率，以另外生成向后推出轨迹。然而，在这种基于模型的方法中，将后向推出和前向推出的样本简单地聚合在一起，通过无模型强化学习算法来优化策略，这可能会降低样本效率和收敛速度。这是因为这种方法忽略了一个事实，即向后推出跟踪通常是从一些高价值状态开始生成的，并且对于代理改进行为来说肯定更具指导意义。在本文中，我们提出了后向模仿和前向强化学习（BIFRL）框架，其中代理将后向推出痕迹视为模仿优秀行为的专家演示，然后收集前向推出过渡以进行策略强化。因此，BIFRL 使智能体能够以更有效的方式到达和探索高价值状态，并进一步减少真实的交互，使其更适合真实的机器人学习。此外，引入了价值正则化生成对抗网络来增强代理不经常接收的有价值的状态。理论上，我们提供了 BIFRL 优于基线方法的条件。通过实验，我们证明，与最先进的基于模型的方法相比，BIFRL 获得了更好的样本效率，并在各种 MuJoCo 运动任务上产生了有竞争力的渐近性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合反向模仿学习与正向强化学习的BIFRL框架，通过双向模型rollout生成轨迹，提升样本效率并优化策略学习。
AI.motivation: 传统模型强化学习仅依赖正向rollout，而现有反向模型方法简单聚合正反向样本会降低效率，因反向轨迹起始于高价值状态更易指导策略优化。
AI.method: BIFRL将反向轨迹视为专家示范进行模仿学习，同时收集正向轨迹用于强化学习，并引入价值正则化GAN增强稀有高价值状态。
AI.result: 实验表明BIFRL在多个MuJoCo任务中展现出更优的样本效率和与先进模型强化方法相当的渐近性能。
AI.conclusion: BIFRL通过区分处理反向轨迹与正向轨迹，有效提升样本利用效率，为实际机器人学习提供了更优解决方案。

conclusion: BIFRL通过区分处理反向轨迹与正向轨迹，有效提升样本利用效率，为实际机器人学习提供了更优解决方案。
search_text: Backward Imitation and Forward Reinforcement Learning via Bi-directional Model Rollouts 通过双向模型推出进行后向模仿和前向强化学习 Traditional model-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods generate forward rollout traces using the learnt dynamics model to reduce interactions with the real environment. The recent model-based RL method considers the way to learn a backward model that specifies the conditional probability of the previous state given the previous action and the current state to additionally generate backward rollout trajectories. However, in this type of model-based method, the samples derived from backward rollouts and those from forward rollouts are simply aggregated together to optimize the policy via the model-free RL algorithm, which may decrease both the sample efficiency and the convergence rate. This is because such an approach ignores the fact that backward rollout traces are often generated starting from some high-value states and are certainly more instructive for the agent to improve the behavior. In this paper, we propose the backward imitation and forward reinforcement learning (BIFRL) framework where the agent treats backward rollout traces as expert demonstrations for the imitation of excellent behaviors, and then collects forward rollout transitions for policy reinforcement. Consequently, BIFRL empowers the agent to both reach to and explore from high-value states in a more efficient manner, and further reduces the real interactions, making it potentially more suitable for real-robot learning. Moreover, a value-regularized generative adversarial network is introduced to augment the valuable states which are infrequently received by the agent. Theoretically, we provide the condition where BIFRL is superior to the baseline methods. Experimentally, we demonstrate that BIFRL acquires the better sample efficiency and produces the competitive asymptotic performance on various MuJoCo locomotion tasks compared against state-of-the-art model-based methods. 传统的基于模型的强化学习 (RL) 方法使用学习到的动态模型生成前向推出轨迹，以减少与真实环境的交互。最近基于模型的强化学习方法考虑了学习向后模型的方法，该模型指定给定先前动作和当前状态的先前状态的条件概率，以另外生成向后推出轨迹。然而，在这种基于模型的方法中，将后向推出和前向推出的样本简单地聚合在一起，通过无模型强化学习算法来优化策略，这可能会降低样本效率和收敛速度。这是因为这种方法忽略了一个事实，即向后推出跟踪通常是从一些高价值状态开始生成的，并且对于代理改进行为来说肯定更具指导意义。在本文中，我们提出了后向模仿和前向强化学习（BIFRL）框架，其中代理将后向推出痕迹视为模仿优秀行为的专家演示，然后收集前向推出过渡以进行策略强化。因此，BIFRL 使智能体能够以更有效的方式到达和探索高价值状态，并进一步减少真实的交互，使其更适合真实的机器人学习。此外，引入了价值正则化生成对抗网络来增强代理不经常接收的有价值的状态。理论上，我们提供了 BIFRL 优于基线方法的条件。通过实验，我们证明，与最先进的基于模型的方法相比，BIFRL 获得了更好的样本效率，并在各种 MuJoCo 运动任务上产生了有竞争力的渐近性能。 本文提出了一种结合反向模仿学习与正向强化学习的BIFRL框架，通过双向模型rollout生成轨迹，提升样本效率并优化策略学习。 Yuxin Pan,Fangzhen Lin cs.LG,cs.RO
